We are not on pace to hit our critical end-of-quarter deadline, which means victory in key races across the nation is at stake.

_**We 're only FIVE seats away from taking back the House. **_Nancy Pelosi's majority has never been so slim! Victory is in sight, but not if we continue to be outraised and outspent by the Left.

[**STOP THE LEFT 'S CASH FLOOD**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6092748a893d4c2eb5fb39791fa2a2dc&_e=21u3uWgjsvKEdcYqcKoVFsspNisVk84_lzlnDicdxDQy1fPMMhyG02N0x-PY196XleLnFR97YaegsgYAOcMvTGjTERwufGM3kyYyFHe8h32HlqBugHk5Kw9EHAN6XblXetEa02_8dn7EU2_-v0c9NURV2vz0pPQ1HgaEIJr6DJ0vK_S7Wdfg4ekMdFX2zrQD_15JBY24G4aQk9LqdQHhK_dV3fu8JFJRq4bB7WrsDDHa7F_oqNy7ut1QfMXytnP0fxHYWO_iXZBowLw2-PrWCm0R6vPkfd2lHGURmxllMp31GufY114SHcvgGuoORKxSOKXNA5siQstk7eBdWhano4GVCaJg42RKf7214wSngy92dxjBYf_02IB1dNG-K01OqjDoTD8Lvf6iRYW7JgheKgHr_py73Oe0BASKGzBxZNPMCAwZe8iOCFEckFoKLTLc0gzshWFxAUlDEO2Z2k2bPWls8nuq6R-4t8UGb1VZBBF6nbO2XEzvw9YOalqf1EiNHiA6TBMWxt_qe4dLHlTzbTHIJE0zZwBwONCJuP8-6gH6C1qT4BHVvd8iaRyFLxY-)

If we fail, the Democrats will continue to implement policies that will drive our great nation into the ground.

_**Failure is not an option, Fellow Conservative. **_

[**CHIP IN TO WIN**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6092748a893d4c2eb5fb39791fa2a2dc&_e=21u3uWgjsvKEdcYqcKoVFsspNisVk84_lzlnDicdxDQy1fPMMhyG02N0x-PY196XleLnFR97YaegsgYAOcMvTGjTERwufGM3kyYyFHe8h32HlqBugHk5Kw9EHAN6XblXetEa02_8dn7EU2_-v0c9NURV2vz0pPQ1HgaEIJr6DJ0vK_S7Wdfg4ekMdFX2zrQD_15JBY24G4aQk9LqdQHhK_dV3fu8JFJRq4bB7WrsDDHa7F_oqNy7ut1QfMXytnP0fxHYWO_iXZBowLw2-PrWCm0R6vPkfd2lHGURmxllMp31GufY114SHcvgGuoORKxSOKXNA5siQstk7eBdWhano_9GcCCAD3EnwfTthsbolNSeKDDf0zegUZ9zf2zWJlM0sF9PmN8nfm93GyKrnMaGWsHjpstr21-JhSmSUY2DxN5Rv70HP4NFB4t1ieeLKxczbiRSd2qwX0YdESRJOAA8ZpNU45r0ZECSMc93gYk6w6ZUoFoV9ypTLMxD0z2m9LYxG1w12FXHnfAjqXTzl347483gGtXG-Qz17U4JsvfTh-zK5y8UCStt3EnsAFTTja8B)

It pains me to see the nation that I proudly served overseas crumble into ruins at the hands of the Radical Left and their failing socialist policies.

**Men and women risk their lives every day to protect and better the lives of the American people, and now it 's our turn to do the same. **

Fellow Conservative, I wouldn't be asking if we weren't in a dire situation.

**Our end-of-quarter deadline is tonight.[Will you commit to joining me in the fight to flip the House and get our country back on track? ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6092748a893d4c2eb5fb39791fa2a2dc&_e=21u3uWgjsvKEdcYqcKoVFsspNisVk84_lzlnDicdxDQy1fPMMhyG02N0x-PY196XleLnFR97YaegsgYAOcMvTGjTERwufGM3kyYyFHe8h32HlqBugHk5Kw9EHAN6XblXetEa02_8dn7EU2_-v0c9NURV2vz0pPQ1HgaEIJr6DJ0vK_S7Wdfg4ekMdFX2zrQD_15JBY24G4aQk9LqdQHhK_dV3fu8JFJRq4bB7WrsDDHa7F_oqNy7ut1QfMXytnP0fxHYWO_iXZBowLw2-PrWCm0R6vPkfd2lHGURmxllMp31GufY114SHcvgGuoORKxSOKXNA5siQstk7eBdWhanox35440nSfAwJBHARG7-rNCFeN5eNIiKGoIDTYAxAXJmmfz8DAVX4U25wmbzkTD7ZMiWUqi1qZ-5iHB0u_Gxslu-YCmusHCs72vP7lVyVhE5jFREgIZU0lSHRHOy3EwTkZiuxkW0UdYjvL5e3f_-oIR3mRiKN5fPGHUqv2H4ewObvUwMF4_7g-QrI-d_2xY885eeUb8Uhy-p0j6DPUhPTOoQYvS3jbkx98w3WUjC21gG)**

name: Mo Brooks
subject: Almost halfway!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
I took an oath to “defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic” and you better believe that I will uphold that oath come hell or high water.
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoq_0630&n=1)
---

| Peter, I took an oath to “defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic” and you better believe that I will uphold that oath come hell or high water. These Socialist infiltrators have made their intentions clear. They will not stop until they’ve overturned the very foundations that have made this the greatest nation in the history of the world. They want to eliminate our national borders, rewrite our nation’s history, disarm our citizenry, and defund our police. They kowtow to criminals while simultaneously criminalizing conservatives for simply exercising our God-given rights. **We CANNOT allow this insanity to continue.** [**Our primary goal right now is to hit 1,000 donations (of any amount!) before June 30th, but at the end of the day, all we can ask is that you do what you can.**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rlt9-_NQpXQhGaqnLEIaEY8DfXMlReA-OTMgmkIOnK-VA&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoq_0630&n=2 "Click here to help me fight back!") [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rlt9-_NQpXQhGaqnLEIaEY8DfXMlReA-OTMgmkIOnK-VA&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoq_0630&n=3 "Click here to help us reach our goal!") We’re currently at 460 donors, and need a little more than twice that to hit our goal. If you’re in a position to donate today and help us chip away at our goal, I’d be eternally grateful for your support. [**Together, we CAN make a difference in this race, in our party, and for our country.**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rlt9-_NQpXQhGaqnLEIaEY8DfXMlReA-OTMgmkIOnK-VA&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoq_0630&n=4 "We can do this. Are you in?") It’s an honor to have you in this fight. Our country is better off because of it. In Liberty,
Mo Brooks [**P.S. -- I just crunched the numbers. We only need about 1 in 20 recipients of this email to step up to smash this goal today. Are you that 1-in-20?**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rlt9-_NQpXQhGaqnLEIaEY8DfXMlReA-OTMgmkIOnK-VA&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoq_0630&n=5 "Are you that 1-in-20?")
---

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoq_0630&n=6).
---

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: It’s late, so we’ll keep it brief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
We know it's late so we'll keep it brief, Peter: We’re racing against the clock to reach our end-of-quarter goal of $150,000.**Right now, we’re still $5,671 short with just a few hours to go.**
Remember, Pramila doesn’t take a single penny from corporate PACs; she’s focused on spending her time legislating and fighting for working Americans in Washington and all across the country. So donations from emails like this one have a major impact on our work to power her priorities forward.
[**Can you make your first donation to this campaign of $3 or more to help us hit our FEC deadline goal before midnight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210630?refcode=em20210630-427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&refcode2=427_420207_37e4wX&akid=427%2E420207%2E37e4wX) _Don’t forget, Pramila will be calling a few grassroots donors who chip in toward our goal to say thank you!_
**[Donate $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210630?refcode=em20210630-427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&refcode2=427_420207_37e4wX&akid=427%2E420207%2E37e4wX)**
Thanks as always for your generous support,
Team Jayapal
P.S. If you donated recently, thank you! Sometimes it takes a day or two for our records to reflect the latest gift.

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210630-427-footer&t=26&refcode2=427_420207_37e4wX&akid=427%2E420207%2E37e4wX)**

clean_body: We know it's late so we'll keep it brief, Peter: We’re racing against the clock to reach our end-of-quarter goal of $150,000.Right now, we’re still $5,671 short with just a few hours to go. Remember, Pramila doesn’t take a single penny from corporate PACs; she’s focused on spending her time legislating and fighting for working Americans in Washington and all across the country. So donations from emails like this one have a major impact on our work to power her priorities forward. Don’t forget, Pramila will be calling a few grassroots donors who chip in toward our goal to say thank you! Thanks as always for your generous support, Team Jayapal P.S. If you donated recently, thank you! Sometimes it takes a day or two for our records to reflect the latest gift. | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

subject: please

body:
| | | I don't have a moment to spare.

**I 'm just 12O minutes away from my most important deadline so far this year, and I'm still behind on my must-hit goal.**

Please understand: The stakes here couldn't be higher.

\-- Republicans have broken three fundraising records in a row.
\-- They have $6 MILLION more at their disposal than my House Democrats.
\-- And their mega donors are just waiting in the wings to line their pockets with even more cash.

**Bottom line: I need your help and your immediate $1 before my deadline expires in just 12O minutes.**

I've left a special link for you to chip in below. I'd be so grateful for your support before midnight.

[**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccjun2021**](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thank you,

Nancy
---

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45233949&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0MDA3OTQzMwS2&l=10390000&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). name: Steve Chabot
subject: Critical Race Theory
body:
Critical Race Theory seeks to divide all Americans... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Critical Race Theory](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-j/)
America is the land of the free and the home of the brave, right? Well, not everyone thinks so. Read about "critical race theory" in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Dems Are Doing a Great Deal of Damage to Our Country](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrats currently control the House, the Senate, and the White House. And they're doing a lot of damage with that power. It's past time we fight back. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [The Mainstream Press Gets it Wrong Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-u/)
Remember when the mainstream press blamed Donald Trump for tear-gassing protesters to do a photo op? Well he didn't. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Lies and Deception](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhhdruk-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Chinese Communist Party has been lying about the Tiananmen Square Massacre for the last 32 years. Now they're lying about the origins of COVID-19 (and more.) You can read about it in this week's blog. name: Candace Owens
subject: ✍️ [Petition] BAN anti-American athletes from Olympics >>
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57844760:JYXjcilfN:m:1:3253819041:0EC1B6B2EE9A81DEB3CD6B4DE6882621:r)
---
| Peter,
---
| Over the weekend, American athlete **Gwen Berry _turned her back_ on the American flag and National Anthem** after winning a spot to represent Team USA at the Summer Olympics. **[I need you to sign our petition](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57844760:JYXjcilfN:m:1:3253819041:0EC1B6B2EE9A81DEB3CD6B4DE6882621:r "I need you to sign our petition")** **DEMANDING** the U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee: **[BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this summer.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57844760:JYXjcilfN:m:1:3253819041:0EC1B6B2EE9A81DEB3CD6B4DE6882621:r "BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this
summer.")**
---
| | | [SIGN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57844760:JYXjcilfN:m:1:3253819041:0EC1B6B2EE9A81DEB3CD6B4DE6882621:r)
---
| After winning 3rd place _and_ a spot at the Olympics during the U.S. Track and Field Trials, **Gwen literally _turned away_ from the American flag** as "The Star-Spangled Banner" played. She then draped herself in a shirt that said "activist athlete." Later, she said, "**The anthem doesn't speak for me. It never has.''** POOR OPPRESSED GWEN, having to _suffer through the National Anthem_ while competing for a spot _on Team USA._ Newsflash, Gwen: representing the USA at the Olympics is a _privilege_. **If you don 't like this country, you don't DESERVE to represent us on the world stage.** **[Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57844760:JYXjcilfN:m:1:3253819041:0EC1B6B2EE9A81DEB3CD6B4DE6882621:r "Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA.")**
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57844760:JYXjcilfN:m:1:3253819041:0EC1B6B2EE9A81DEB3CD6B4DE6882621:r)
---
| Thanks,

Candace
---

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57844875:JE4cMilNo:m:1:3253819041:6F18999C874473BB363BBD5980E0E444:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57844875:JE4cMilNo:m:1:3253819041:6F18999C874473BB363BBD5980E0E444:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. [**But there 's something you can do.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57844875:JE4cMilNo:m:1:3253819041:6F18999C874473BB363BBD5980E0E444:r) That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57844875:JE4cMilNo:m:1:3253819041:6F18999C874473BB363BBD5980E0E444:r) And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. clean_body: Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple. And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race. Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it. They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back. The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.But we must act now. My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project. But I don't stand a chance without you. And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state. Thank you in advance for your support. | | Peter, THIS. IS. HUGE. **CNN: Trump Organization expected to be charged with tax crimes on Thursday** The Manhattan District Attorney's office is expected to charge Trump with tax crimes TODAY. Unsurprisingly, Trump is already falsely claiming this investigation is a partisan witch-hunt, and he is calling into question the legitimacy of both AG Tish James and DA Cyrus Vance Jr. in an effort to obstruct justice yet again. Tish James and Cyrus Vance Jr. can't defend their investigations publicly without violating ethics rules \-- that means they can't stand up to Trump's lies. That's why it's absolutely crucial that we fight beside them, so that we can defend their integrity from Trump's smears. name: Mark, House Conservatives HQ
subject: We didn’t – couldn’t – do this for anyone else, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I was told you were a top Trump Patriot committed to defending his legacy from Pelosi and her Radical Mob, but you failed to step up

Hey Peter, here at House Republicans HQ, it's my job to make sure we have the required resources to fight back against the Left's attacks, flip the FIVE SEATS we need to reclaim the House Majority, and FIRE Pelosi.

**Last night the FEC end-of-quarter deadline - our most important deadline yet - passed. And we fell disastrously short.** I wish I had better news, Peter, but [**unless every grassroots patriot who reads this steps up and chips in $20.22 IN THE NEXT HOUR to close the gap the Democrats will trample us in top-targeted, key races that will determine who controls the House Majority.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)

[**CHIP IN $20.22**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)

_Kevin McCarthy.
Steve Scalise.
Elise Stefanik.
Dan Crenshaw.
VP Mike Pence.
Donald Trump Jr._

Every single one of these top conservative patriots reached out to ask for your support before our critical deadline. We told you victory was on the line. **Despite our please, you didn 't step up to STOP the Left's Socialist Agenda. [Was this a mistake?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)**

[**YES, COUNT ME IN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)

[**NO, I'M A SOCIALIST**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)

Peter, I'm deeply disappointed. I was told you were a top Trump Patriot committed to defending his legacy from Pelosi and her Radical Mob, but you failed to step up when we needed you most. Trump's America First legacy is on the line - if we fail to take back the House, it'll be gone for good.

**After all that Donald Trump and his allies in Congress have done for you, it 's your turn to fight for them. [Even $1 goes a long way to stopping the Left in their tracks....](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)**

[**CHIP IN $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847597:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)

[**CHIP IN $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847598:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)

[**CHIP IN $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)

[**CHIP IN $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)

[**ANY AMOUNT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)

This deadline was critical. Reaching our goal was critical - and we FAILED. Peter, we can't afford to let the Left outraise AGAIN so we have no choice...

**[If 109,918 patriots give whatever they can- $5, $10, even just $1 - IN THE NEXT 1 HOUR we'll have a fighting chance. It's dire so we're only reaching out to TOP Trump Patriots.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r) That means the fate of the House Majority is going to come down to what you do in this moment.**

Please help set the record straight. We've extended the deadline ONLY FOR YOU and TOP Patriots, Peter. Nobody else gets this kind of treatment.

[**Unless you 've given up on Trump and now support Nancy Pelosi, please step up! The next 1 HOUR will determine whether we WIN or LOSE it all.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847596:6WsaZilN3:m:1:3253819041:F0EEF1442865BE816D86A47DB11A688C:r)

Sincerely,

Mark
House Republicans HQ

| | Friend, The Legislature just wrapped up the state budget and I am proud to share that we made many investments in education, healthcare, and Minnesotans' economic security. Our budget is grounded in improving racial equity and reducing economic disparities for all Minnesotans. While there is still so much work to be done, we prevented Republicans from restricting voting rights, weakening our schools, and putting large corporations and the rich ahead of most Minnesotans' COVID-19 economic recovery. **Here 's what I know for sure: without a DFL Majority in the Minnesota House, this budget would have looked very different.** This isn't just speculation, we're seeing it in action all across the country. name: Josh Hawley
subject: Less Cops=More Crime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847864:600w_ilTN:m:1:3253819041:EB864A7E58676A6496CF377A8DEF4B55:r "Defund") Peter: Shooting 73% Robbery 46.7% Grand Larceny 35.6% Felony Assault 20.5% All of this happened in ONE MONTH in New York City - and I am worried this is only the beginning - I worry that it is heading to our streets, all while Joe Biden's party is defunding the police. **Someone needs to stand up, and if they refuse to help the American people - it is up to us. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847864:600w_ilTN:m:1:3253819041:EB864A7E58676A6496CF377A8DEF4B55:r "STAND WITH JOSH")[Will you stand with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847864:600w_ilTN:m:1:3253819041:EB864A7E58676A6496CF377A8DEF4B55:r "Will you stand with me?")** Democrats are happy to watch crime threaten your family if it helps him appease the radical left - but I can't sit back and watch this happen. I have introduced a bill to put 100,000 new police officers on our streets and end the violence. **[You can learn more about my proposal here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847864:600w_ilTN:m:1:3253819041:EB864A7E58676A6496CF377A8DEF4B55:r "You can learn more about my proposal here.")** My stand against crime continues to make me a target of the left - I need to know if you are willing to help me fight back **[or if you are standing with Joe Biden, the Squad, and the Defund Democrats.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847864:600w_ilTN:m:1:3253819041:EB864A7E58676A6496CF377A8DEF4B55:r "or if you are standing
with Joe Biden, the Squad, and the Defund Democrats.")** **Why do so many on the left refuse to admit that fewer cops = more crime? Their ridiculous assertion is costing lives, and _we cannot allow the increase in violence to continue._** There are forces on the left that see a benefit to increasing crime rates. They are playing games with our future - and I won't allow it. **Please - if you value your family and your safety, [I need to hear from you today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847864:600w_ilTN:m:1:3253819041:EB864A7E58676A6496CF377A8DEF4B55:r "I need to hear from you today.")** For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847864:600w_ilTN:m:1:3253819041:EB864A7E58676A6496CF377A8DEF4B55:r "Josh Hawley") Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847864:600w_ilTN:m:1:3253819041:EB864A7E58676A6496CF377A8DEF4B55:r "STAND WITH JOSH")

Friend, this is really bad news: **We missed our critical end-of-quarter goal last night, which means our entire movement to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue is now at risk.**
We knew this was an ambitious goal, but with extremists like Kelli Ward and Marjorie Taylor-Greene making Arizona ground zero for their Trumpist agenda, we really can't afford to miss important goals like this. Everything from voting rights to education to health care is on the line in this race – and the only way we can defeat the GOP extremism that's held our state back is if we flip the governorship blue.
But here's the good news: **If everyone reading this chips in just $5 right now, we'd make up our shortfall in _minutes_. **Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms we can win this battleground race – but not without your immediate grassroots support.
**So I have to ask: With so much on the line, can I count on you to rush a donation now to close our fundraising gap, power our movement forward on _our_ terms and keep fighting to flip Arizona blue?

Here's the best link: ****[www.marcolopez.com/donate-eoq2-shortfall](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31731394/293582138/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk143-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2ZjZWExYS04NmRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQtD9SB0K25Gm_ssBXGRSLaaiD6g9gCZR-4MwTk74x4=)**
Thanks for never giving up, friend. With you on this team, I know we can win this thing and build a state that works for all of us.

– Marco
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. name: Karen Bass
subject: We are launching an investigation into the January 6 Capitol insurrection. (Please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hello,

Yesterday, I voted to approve the creation of a select committee to investigate the January 6 Capitol insurrection. I made this decision easily, but not lightly.

The events on January 6 took American lives and put the sanctity of our democracy in jeopardy. Donald Trump and the politicians who fueled the flames that led to the attack must be held accountable. But even now, Republican leadership is showing their hand -- proving outright their allegiance is to Donald Trump and not the American people.

This is shameful. The American people deserve the truth about the events leading up to and during the attack. Senate Republicans filibustered the formation of a bipartisan commission, so a select committee is the clear next step.

**[I won't rest until justice is served and we get answers. I need YOUR help to let Republicans know that I'm not fighting on my own. Add your name next to mine to support our investigation into the Capitol insurrection.](https://act.myngp.com/el/lSeMOCDo-loMSbN2hPbPkMhbGqEMUThaf9DNsqiHg_s=/LM0KCXndDZV4bhbOfMK6zlePBWax49_Bf-4OaZPtq28=?gpsid=39_132_19599&ms=em21_210701_6comis_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210701_6comis_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210701_6comis_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, It’s hard to believe that Election Day is 16 months away -- I really feel like we just closed the books on the Senate run-offs in Georgia! That’s why I wanted to tell you personally how grateful I am to have you by my side now, when we’re still in the early stages of this reelection campaign. I mean it sincerely when I say that your early support is the single most valuable thing for holding this seat. It lets us plan, show momentum, and connect with each and every voter about our shared values. I’m fighting for hard-working families every day in the Senate, and I couldn’t be prouder of the relief brought by the American Rescue Plan. People are getting vaccinated, businesses are reopening, and mental health resources are becoming available. I’m committed to continuing this work, and that’s only possible with you standing with me. So from the bottom of my heart, thank you, and here’s to what’s ahead. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Folks — I just spoke with my finance team, and I want to say thank you. Thank you for stepping up, answering the call, and standing with me as we fight for working families from Platteville to Pepin and everywhere in between. Because of YOU and our dedicated grassroots supporters, we not only hit our big Q2 fundraising goal, we smashed right through it! In doing so, Team Kind sent an unmistakable message to our opponent and their dark money allies that we are more than ready for the battle ahead. Bottom line, we wouldn't be here without you. I promise you, if we stand united and rise to meet every challenge together, we'll continue to hit every milestone we set and win again for Wisconsin. Working for you, Ron | | | | | | | | | | | | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . Emails are the best way to stay updated on our campaign but if you wish .

body:
This is Representative Adam Smith of Weskan, Kansas. I have the privilege of serving my community in the state legislature in Topeka and serving our e Friend, This is Representative Adam Smith of Weskan, Kansas. I have the privilege of serving my community in the state legislature in Topeka and serving our entire state as Chairman of the House Taxation Committee. My family has been farming in Kansas for six generations. I’m writing to you to announce my endorsement of Derek Schmdt in the race to be Kansas’s next governor. [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=1362a7e1bed841048f31f8b808eccaeb&_e=CoFNkKVMTmEUy4gPpRLNs5Qz_1ty1hFvP6dK6w7ToedlDEr5Uy6B3lF1ILyQJTnSmkqY3OpMJGFUsBj5KFLIHhGWHTgcNgudvqFVEe_DUOoyZy0qBWSxmx96OtU1dSmlcAQUJwW8MGfkaEiVuvGQlUaVJ10mc3C9kttiWGAqlbfVVV_6FUj51UPYrfP_OXJzm97gNTeYpZfnwFOmz3Jkm5GfX6Ojwr8HvZr5qj6u2o7RMHYXJDP9ALt4q79krZZo-JJm12dNlLvtRYRNZaQcEs_ITPscS43CCfZMsfr0dBG2YFVJC2vnlCTgdnxvUbqIFjqyk0uoyLnWZlzKDFKS5xDAtaTRGNNJtOtMZHM8snKLxQsj4TfIoovqdDmN5_rk5srE2XBfTh7QoHEMp8x_gDJUNEV3dtgiSLawGFGeZy1Ex2hx7w430jQYl0CYAoo-vtNOgvi6TZsB74ZveMtBUw%3D%3D) **[Will you chip in $10 today to help out Derek’s campaign?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=1362a7e1bed841048f31f8b808eccaeb&_e=CoFNkKVMTmEUy4gPpRLNs5Qz_1ty1hFvP6dK6w7ToedlDEr5Uy6B3lF1ILyQJTnSmkqY3OpMJGFUsBj5KFLIHvhfv1oT_LoasjDfg1CYycYNp5pWUqyBOMqdn5RNLtXgnF1ddOOqUnJApdxvG4wava6eG1E60hdxBNTJErhtBw0fuoEhxG-M5WZr82fJZpkSdZ42DrjLzbZY3bVCikkP7E7_iq9N2ezFOLBoISAlq61uTDSCXoLTwOI4s1JZfto8n0KVZ-nHrR0cLnETlUD7fa9MMLDfx7pEPVjd1jO7fliu5-dDklCS9htyzk_xv4p1pQxmBKODIHWKDPV_IiBy1d_owKylRtqLvl2J777uEiww70lZxeLkBy_1d19-6vBdLq0bTpdONsPaUHYkgpn-EjNVbE6M1MsxTlguP-12VOepaoIMQwmwTmUDs-_V8SKtkeNFYpte_xfycJfkID5jv_Uflzei8Osc2QMRyUNTYwM%3D)** [**CHIP IN HERE**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=1362a7e1bed841048f31f8b808eccaeb&_e=CoFNkKVMTmEUy4gPpRLNs5Qz_1ty1hFvP6dK6w7ToedlDEr5Uy6B3lF1ILyQJTnSmkqY3OpMJGFUsBj5KFLIHhGWHTgcNgudvqFVEe_DUOoyZy0qBWSxmx96OtU1dSmlcAQUJwW8MGfkaEiVuvGQlUaVJ10mc3C9kttiWGAqlbfVVV_6FUj51UPYrfP_OXJzm97gNTeYpZfnwFOmz3Jkm5GfX6Ojwr8HvZr5qj6u2o56xQ4vHZT1AqWolzc8nf47i1TzZHUnIV9bBSigL4GOsoRJudZcwq_5_qoPWD2Ur80SH4dNZdyUOT8czco0fnK4IZHdiUv79-lqLgWVIbxA5tUQf0_bblC-wdfrvpLoRZWE51_DfmScTGhBeKg6EcLYVdDLULAaP6vtGnByAuBPW77gUv66gS55Irsw3ZK4LiqU1VTHckQUwdvG8sYQlaDxdT7phcJTcnSqu6OsUBIHsQ%3D%3D) You and I know that Kansans thrive when we keep our taxes and spending low. Farmers, ranchers, and small businesses succeed when they’re keeping more of the money they’ve worked hard for. Laura Kelly and her reckless veto of the common-sense tax reform bill passed this Legislative session by Republicans - even with support from some Democrats - clearly shows she doesn’t get it. Thankfully, we had the votes to override her veto and return money to Kansas taxpayers. But that veto highlights the importance of defeating her in 2022. Derek Schmidt understands our conservative values, and he wouldn’t have hesitated to sign it into law. I know Derek’s the right choice for Kansas because he’ll work for, not against, our hardworking families. He’s done it his entire career. [**Click Here to Help Support Derek’s Campaign >>>**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=1362a7e1bed841048f31f8b808eccaeb&_e=CoFNkKVMTmEUy4gPpRLNs5Qz_1ty1hFvP6dK6w7ToedlDEr5Uy6B3lF1ILyQJTnSmkqY3OpMJGFUsBj5KFLIHhGWHTgcNgudvqFVEe_DUOoyZy0qBWSxmx96OtU1dSmlcAQUJwW8MGfkaEiVuvGQlUaVJ10mc3C9kttiWGAqlbfVVV_6FUj51UPYrfP_OXJzm97gNTeYpZfnwFOmz3Jkm5GfX6Ojwr8HvZr5qj6u2o6sot1r1CMZf-ZitSnlsoah85zqhvv89iahj5q6iW2_InGuDboGqE7onw-o1Y2Zu5AMvEvaT0roAujOtKjZqZZ10rTTsIlDbGz2Q1Od2DjIb1360KzQ1UdSRfwWm_1w9vzWzM9YSBQJ0_drLa2AsPVNKB-coWiECUOjn670Tthq6qDz8sJFtMIFFSXjbHwwLpfGoalbOzzp_V9wJZ0eAakSeBsKhvZwURg-Q9X_jlUklA%3D%3D) We’ve been farming in western Kansas since the mid-1860’s, so it’s especially important to me that we elect a governor who won’t turn their back on our state’s farmers and ranchers. I know that Derek Schmidt will never leave us behind, and that’s why I’m proud to endorse his campaign. There is no one better to defeat Laura Kelly and get Kansas back to being the state we know and love. **Please, consider chipping in a few dollars today to support Derek Schmidt’s campaign for governor.** [**DONATE HERE**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=1362a7e1bed841048f31f8b808eccaeb&_e=CoFNkKVMTmEUy4gPpRLNs5Qz_1ty1hFvP6dK6w7ToedlDEr5Uy6B3lF1ILyQJTnSmkqY3OpMJGFUsBj5KFLIHhGWHTgcNgudvqFVEe_DUOoyZy0qBWSxmx96OtU1dSmlcAQUJwW8MGfkaEiVuvGQlUaVJ10mc3C9kttiWGAqlbfVVV_6FUj51UPYrfP_OXJzm97gNTeYpZfnwFOmz3Jkm5GfX6Ojwr8HvZr5qj6u2o5R2sPgUZrL-n03xIBAADq5tBdNpiopEp-VH_kIPErYonB0bnfJpneJwUY1S_roDmOabRERLF_T2Nh5G-tVejDrI1DGzpz6VMc8YK6qEG_sB7FD7Eh-THOH3oYDdEjPmguSI2hWqi0LMnS7whognmpswVyEMfhLFuu1UHFroNIyJtEs3LZYMLN3XHrrU4vT5M_qWYZYkcayIctmRTKdYKEYI6pbdYkO3DOURksMl35U7Q%3D%3D) Sincerely, Adam Smith Chairman, House Taxation Committee Representative, House District 120 | |

name: Wendy Rogers
subject: Can you help us fight Biden and the media?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE
body:
Protect Our Audit |
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r)
---
| Hi Peter,

Biden's goon Merrick Garland has no constitutional authority to interfere with Arizona's audit. Per the U.S. Constitution, the states determine the method and specifics of the elections; and per the Arizona Constitution, the legislature has oversight over elections and election law.

I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the Arizona State Senator who was the pivotal vote for the audit. **[Can you help me fight back against Joe Biden's unconstitutional meddling?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r)**

Ballot counting is finished. Then the report on the results can be given.

We have learned so much from this audit- some needed fixes, for instance, which have already prompted needed legislation.

This exercise has been a smashing success. Over 10 states sent delegations to learn and replicate Arizona's audit procedure.

**This was also privately funded.**

So what does Biden's goonish Attorney General Merrick Garland do? _Threaten Arizona, hire lawyers, and defame an effort he knows nothing about. _

For all the people and legislators who came to tour the audit and learn, Democrats were not among them. **Neither Arizona's incompetent Secretary of State nor Merrick Garland came to see the audit and study what we are doing. **
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r)
---
| _**Garland wants to double the number of DOJ attorneys in its civil rights division, to persecute sovereign states like Arizona who are auditing our 2020 results.**_

The attorney general is pushing the Civil Rights Division to hire more attorneys and is announcing that within 30 days the Justice Department will double its "enforcement staff for protecting the right to vote."

Garland noted the Justice Department "will apply the same scrutiny to post-election audits to ensure they abide by federal statutory requirements to protect election records and avoid the intimidation of voters. In that regard, we will publish guidance explaining the civil and criminal statutes that apply to post-election audits."

Arizona Senate President Karen Fann, who has previously stated that the audit is not meant to overturn the 2020 election results but instead to restore trust in the system, responded claiming the process was and will remain compliant with federal and state civil rights laws.

What Garland fails to realize is that Arizona has done our homework. Four different courts of law affirmed the right of the Arizona Senate to oversee scrutiny of the election results.

The people have already voted. _No one is being stopped from voting in the 2020 election!_

**But we will do what we must to reassure the American public that elections in Arizona are secure. This audit has been critical to that regard.**
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r)
---
| You know where the DOJ has ACTUAL constitutional authority to get involved and make a difference? __**On the border, with the immigration crisis that Biden created!**__

There has been human trafficking, gang activity that overwhelms local authorities, drug running, murders, and all kinds of issues relating to the humanitarian crisis that Biden created with his "catch and release" policies.

This is real. Biden is going to let a terrorist cell into the country, because they will walk through our unguarded southern border.

_**Merrick Garland is a bitter little man, who is trying to abuse the Department of Justice for nakedly political ends.**_

Thankfully, Arizona's Attorney General is ready to take Garland and Biden to court to protect Arizonans- as he should. _Garland will not stop the audit._

Where Garland needs to be is on the border. He hasn't gone there, Kamala Harris hasn't gone there, yet the Governor of Florida, Gov. DeSantis, is sending National Guard troops to help us man the border that the Feds left unguarded.

**Right now, it feels like it's Arizona vs. Biden's regime.[Help us win this fight!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r)**
---
| Election integrity isn't an untested theory. **We have proof. Hard proof. And we are learning just how to close these election law loopholes.**

I am the key vote that allowed the audit to proceed.And I have been front and center to defend it against the far-Left. [That's why I need to ask for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r)

**Biden wants to shut us down in the WORST way. We can't let him! **[Stand with me so we can finish the job!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r)

_I will stand up and speak the truth about this audit. We have nothing to hide and nothing to be ashamed of![So I need your help!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r)_

[Help me fight for the truth!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r) \- Help me keep my seat so we can fight back against Biden, together!

Thank you and God bless you.
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r)
---
| Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret)
Arizona State Senator
Arizona's 6th Legislative District
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r)
---
| P.S. I am fighting hard to fulfill my campaign promises. I am taking a lot of heat but I don't care. [Please support me by helping me raise my goal by the end of this month.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57846864:Jh0pSil0N:m:1:3253819041:69C7B7CD53B1A80506C864F20BFADE38:r) Thank you.

I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the Arizona State Senator who was the pivotal vote for the audit. Ballot counting is finished. Then the report on the results can be given. We have learned so much from this audit- some needed fixes, for instance, which have already prompted needed legislation. This exercise has been a smashing success. Over 10 states sent delegations to learn and replicate Arizona's audit procedure. This was also privately funded. So what does Biden's goonish Attorney General Merrick Garland do? Threaten Arizona, hire lawyers, and defame an effort he knows nothing about. For all the people and legislators who came to tour the audit and learn, Democrats were not among them. Neither Arizona's incompetent Secretary of State nor Merrick Garland came to see the audit and study what we are doing. | | Garland wants to double the number of DOJ attorneys in its civil rights division, to persecute sovereign states like Arizona who are auditing our 2020 results. The attorney general is pushing the Civil Rights Division to hire more attorneys and is announcing that within 30 days the Justice Department will double its "enforcement staff for protecting the right to vote." Garland noted the Justice Department "will apply the same scrutiny to post-election audits to ensure they abide by federal statutory requirements to protect election records and avoid the intimidation of voters. In that regard, we will publish guidance explaining the civil and criminal statutes that apply to post-election audits." Arizona Senate President Karen Fann, who has previously stated that the audit is not meant to overturn the 2020 election results but instead to restore trust in the system, responded claiming the process was and will remain compliant with federal and state civil rights laws. What Garland fails to realize is that Arizona has done our homework. Four different courts of law affirmed the right of the Arizona Senate to oversee scrutiny of the election results. The people have already voted. No one is being stopped from voting in the 2020 election! But we will do what we must to reassure the American public that elections in Arizona are secure. This audit has been critical to that regard. | | You know where the DOJ has ACTUAL constitutional authority to get involved and make a difference? On the border, with the immigration crisis that Biden created! There has been human trafficking, gang activity that overwhelms local authorities, drug running, murders, and all kinds of issues relating to the humanitarian crisis that Biden created with his "catch and release" policies. This is real. Biden is going to let a terrorist cell into the country, because they will walk through our unguarded southern border. Merrick Garland is a bitter little man, who is trying to abuse the Department of Justice for nakedly political ends. Thankfully, Arizona's Attorney General is ready to take Garland and Biden to court to protect Arizonans- as he should. Garland will not stop the audit. Where Garland needs to be is on the border. He hasn't gone there, Kamala Harris hasn't gone there, yet the Governor of Florida, Gov. DeSantis, is sending National Guard troops to help us man the border that the Feds left unguarded. Right now, it feels like it's Arizona vs. Biden's regime. | Election integrity isn't an untested theory. We have proof. Hard proof. And we are learning just how to close these election law loopholes. I am the key vote that allowed the audit to proceed.And I have been front and center to defend it against the far-Left. Biden wants to shut us down in the WORST way. We can't let him! I will stand up and speak the truth about this audit. We have nothing to hide and nothing to be ashamed of \- Help me keep my seat so we can fight back against Biden, together! Thank you and God bless you. | | Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret) Arizona State Senator Arizona's 6th Legislative District | | P.S. I am fighting hard to fulfill my campaign promises. I am taking a lot of heat but I don't care. Thank you. PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE Wendy Rogers is a retired member of the Air Force. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. | | | Copyright(C) 2021 Wendy Rogers for AZ Senate, All rights reserved. name: NH GOP
subject: Dan Crenshaw is coming to New Hampshire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
The Grafton County R.C. and NH GOP are delighted to welcome Congressman Crenshaw on Thursday July 8th
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnhgop-gcrc-dinner-with-congressman-dan-crenshaw%2F/1/0100017a624ddd15-18b2c6ba-16c4-408b-b199-ebf8169051d1-000000/KtGqSaHZ8kc9kZnoBTp7MNXQ738=225)
Derek,
The Grafton County Republican Committee and New Hampshire GOP are delighted to welcome Congressman Dan Crenshaw to New Hampshire on Thursday, July 8th. The event will take place at the Grappone Center in Concord (70 Constitution Ave) beginning at 6:00pm.
Congressman Crenshaw has been one of the nation's strongest conservative voices, and we are very excited for him to be joining us in the Granite State.
_Attendance for the event is limited, and will sell out_. If you are interested in attending, reserve your seat before tickets are all gone!

[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnhgop-gcrc-dinner-with-congressman-dan-crenshaw%2F/2/0100017a624ddd15-18b2c6ba-16c4-408b-b199-ebf8169051d1-000000/DOFA77CCNvIAOjFuEwbfgT8NqZM=225)

Dinner tickets, tickets to a VIP Reception with Congressman Crenshaw, and sponsorships are available.
Details for the event can be found on the events page at [www.NH.gop](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnhgop-gcrc-dinner-with-congressman-dan-crenshaw%2F/3/0100017a624ddd15-18b2c6ba-16c4-408b-b199-ebf8169051d1-000000/NxU98aqI5dL565kqz5MtQG7PjKQ=225), or via the link below.
Please join us for this exclusive event! We look forward to seeing you there!

[Reserve Your Tickets Today](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnhgop-gcrc-dinner-with-congressman-dan-crenshaw%2F/4/0100017a624ddd15-18b2c6ba-16c4-408b-b199-ebf8169051d1-000000/jIKfn_k7wCbbgEloTqf1dVu8v3I=225)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Today’s Supreme Court ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Today, the Supreme Court handed down a decision in _Brnovich v. Democratic National Committee_ that has disastrous implications for the future of voting rights in the United States.
[**I’ll explain more about this decision in a moment, but first, I’d like to ask you to add your name to support the Judiciary Act, legislation that will expand the size of the Supreme Court.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31738989/293599528/-1393288651?source=direct_link&referrer=group-mondaire-for-congress&refcode=em210701-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQwM2ViYi05NGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKTjyATMz-xB9XTmY1ZpKI7VhOS3zG7iHcpr7I1UZek=&emci=079c7d39-78cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d9d03ebb-94da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
The truth is that the Court’s conservative majority has dealt blow after blow to the foundations of our democracy — and this won’t stop until we add four seats to the Court to restore ideological balance.
[**Please, add your name here to support passage of the Judiciary Act to expand the Supreme Court.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31738991/293599530/-1393288651?source=direct_link&referrer=group-mondaire-for-congress&refcode=em210701-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQwM2ViYi05NGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKTjyATMz-xB9XTmY1ZpKI7VhOS3zG7iHcpr7I1UZek=&emci=079c7d39-78cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d9d03ebb-94da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
Okay, here’s what’s going on.
In Arizona, more people vote by mail than vote in person — but many Arizonans of color, specifically Hispanic and indigenous people living in rural areas, don’t receive mail delivery to their homes and don’t live anywhere near a post office. It’s common for individuals in these communities to hand off their ballots to friends or ballot collection volunteers when Election Day comes around.
**But in 2016, Arizona passed a bill making it illegal for anyone other than family members, caretakers, or postal workers to deliver ballots on a voter’s behalf.**
Let’s not mince words: this law is an attempt to stop people of color from voting in Arizona. And the Supreme Court’s decision to uphold these blatant attempts at voter suppression in _Brnovich v. Democratic National Committee_ won’t just hurt people in that state — it will also uphold local regulations that make it harder for Americans to vote all over the country.
Republicans in Congress know that maintaining and expanding the conservative majority on the Supreme Court is the easiest way to continue upholding racist voter suppression laws.
The only way we can fight back is to pass the Judiciary Act, which will expand the Supreme Court and save our democracy.
[**Please, add your name here to support passage of the Judiciary Act to expand the Supreme Court.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31738993/293599532/-1393288651?source=direct_link&referrer=group-mondaire-for-congress&refcode=em210701-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQwM2ViYi05NGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKTjyATMz-xB9XTmY1ZpKI7VhOS3zG7iHcpr7I1UZek=&emci=079c7d39-78cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d9d03ebb-94da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
Adding four seats to the Supreme Court is key to restoring the Court’s ideological balance and stopping the GOP’s attacks on democracy and the right to vote.
I won’t back down until we pass this legislation, and I appreciate your support in this effort.
Onward,
Mondaire
* * *
[Website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31738995/293599534/-6145312?refcode=em210701-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQwM2ViYi05NGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKTjyATMz-xB9XTmY1ZpKI7VhOS3zG7iHcpr7I1UZek=&emci=079c7d39-78cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d9d03ebb-94da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896) | [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31738997/293599536/1405969458?refcode=em210701-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQwM2ViYi05NGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKTjyATMz-xB9XTmY1ZpKI7VhOS3zG7iHcpr7I1UZek=&emci=079c7d39-78cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d9d03ebb-94da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896) | [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31738999/293599538/660234743?refcode=em210701-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQwM2ViYi05NGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKTjyATMz-xB9XTmY1ZpKI7VhOS3zG7iHcpr7I1UZek=&emci=079c7d39-78cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d9d03ebb-94da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896) | [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31739001/293599540/24960265?refcode=em210701-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQwM2ViYi05NGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKTjyATMz-xB9XTmY1ZpKI7VhOS3zG7iHcpr7I1UZek=&emci=079c7d39-78cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d9d03ebb-94da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)

We just received our End of Quarter numbers, and unfortunately, Senator Braun just missed his June fundraising goal by **$4,054.**

Mike's Finance Team has agreed to **_[EXTEND THIS DEADLINE UNTIL TONIGHT AT 11:59 PM!](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=40c7d0a0669f45dd815fd871991fdbe3&_e=vo2zISCmOIJHhnB_HH0r1YwOrBHsA8N3oa0fUru_hMmgCigahXrx3gOfB20TNDQsSGzcQK70hite7Y8KkA3N3AN7_dKsLOsk5VcJNMZHQZZAUqLZn885JuGo2MN2v4O3_TVU5UIJABVGEZl2L7QFJneLSYD-F_huSphCuXDyff08sKEhsqMwcdPrUJXG9LbvStbUEbdkA4oq38g2qwdS8CTM-JzB-IUZ2CbtrRhvbeNB52CqmYsLD66De-eiQdWU18x20YB6MIfdumC1Ub0lLQVaIiq6dyrRNJnOHwkfYTw1R_FnRcq4oNysRmETVVNatwI7S-vWjCmKNc2z_KJOzSr1T1n4E0vltX2zONQe8rdHykVL5ncZQQjWbQDPU5ErJyBnGFb5jgNvD7SvVGiBL8eBz8O9HsotUjpN5X8EpREXB0mVMSje938YYOsVIHvDQkwwyZCpk6z3df0h2DKQHkd8sLjy9Yn51dSkr8o7USM%3D)_**

**Joe Biden is a Trojan Horse for Socialism,** which is why _we’re doing everything in our power on the finance team to stop him._

name: Mike Thompson
subject: your support makes change possible
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

I wanted to thank you for all of the support that you’ve shown our campaign over this past quarter. It’s an honor to represent my community in California’s 5th congressional district — and supporters like you make my job worthwhile every day.

I also want to thank all those who joined us on Saturday for our Fourth Annual Rock the Ride, a benefit ride and walk for gun violence prevention. I started this event four years ago after the tragic shooting at the Yountville Veterans Home to raise awareness of gun violence and rally people across our nation to take action. I’m glad that so many of our friends and neighbors were able to join us virtually this year and hope to see you all again next year.

Following our morning ride, I sat down with Coach Steve Kerr for a discussion where we addressed the need for gun violence prevention across the nation. You can check out my conversation with Coach Kerr by clicking here: [**_https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T62qfNWgU_M_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31741052/293607021/-803653937?v=T62qfNWgU_M&refcode=MT_EM_FR_6MO_210701_1_1&refcode2=73dd1959-9ada-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2RkMTk1OS05YWRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N5JaSx_Ijk1-dSTnO1WkzP4MGJ45keveYBdHBKGRakI=&emci=9d644666-98da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=73dd1959-9ada-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2678920)

Again, thank you for supporting our campaign over the last few months — and thanks to all those who joined us to take a stand against gun violence in America.

Mike

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Keep Taxpayer Dollars out of Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847978:J0rH4ilDN:m:1:3253819041:FCC0E737C6435BEEF7F3762ACF6AF3E5:r) Hi Peter, I'm Claudia Tenney -- I'm a small business owner, Marine mom, and a conservative Congresswoman. I'm here to warn you. With Biden in charge, it looks like we're back to the Obama days of sending pallets of cash to terrorist-funding regimes like Iran. **_FIRST,_** Joe Biden and Barack Obama pushed the disastrous Iran Deal, giving Iran billions in taxpayer dollars. **_THEN,_** it was reported that John Kerry might have undermined the U.S. mission in the Middle East and betrayed our allies in Israel. **_NOW,_** they lifted economic sanctions on one of the most dangerous countries in the world. **It looks like Joe Biden and his administration are back to bailing out their friends in Iran while giving away your hard-earned tax dollars.** [**No More Taxpayer $ for Iran**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847978:J0rH4ilDN:m:1:3253819041:FCC0E737C6435BEEF7F3762ACF6AF3E5:r) Peter, we can be almost certain that the money will be used to fund more attacks on Israel and our allies. **Joe Biden pretends and says he supports Israel, but his actions tell a different story. ** Peter, we must put an end to Biden's funding of our enemies like Iran. That's why I'm asking for your supportー**[ _will you chip in a few dollars to support my fight against Biden 's theft of the American Taxpayer?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847978:J0rH4ilDN:m:1:3253819041:FCC0E737C6435BEEF7F3762ACF6AF3E5:r)** [**No More Taxpayer $ for Iran**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847978:J0rH4ilDN:m:1:3253819041:FCC0E737C6435BEEF7F3762ACF6AF3E5:r) Peter, America shouldn't be giving taxpayer dollars to Iran, a country that has a history of: **-> Imprisoning American citizens. ** **-> Committing human rights abuses against their own people.** **-> Funding terrorism around the world.** _**The worst part is that Biden and Democrats don 't just want to be allied with Iran; they want YOU to pay for it!**_ **[_Don 't let Biden give another $ to Iran; Rush A Donation Now >>_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847978:J0rH4ilDN:m:1:3253819041:FCC0E737C6435BEEF7F3762ACF6AF3E5:r)** [**No More Taxpayer $ for Iran**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847978:J0rH4ilDN:m:1:3253819041:FCC0E737C6435BEEF7F3762ACF6AF3E5:r) As a single mother and small business owner, I understand the importance of hard work, determination, and grit. I was consistently ranked as the top conservative legislator in New York. As an ardent defender of the Second Amendment, I was the first to sponsor a bill to fully repeal New York Governor Cuomo's unconstitutional gun grab. In Congress, I continue to fight for the hardworking families, small business owners, and family farmers in upstate New York. Strong, conservative women are the future of the Republican Party. If we don't support them, House Democrats will be empowered to continue their attacks on President Trump and Republicans who stand up to them. Thank you, Claudia Tenney [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847978:J0rH4ilDN:m:1:3253819041:FCC0E737C6435BEEF7F3762ACF6AF3E5:r) | |
---
[**SAVE AMERICA IN 2022**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57847978:J0rH4ilDN:m:1:3253819041:FCC0E737C6435BEEF7F3762ACF6AF3E5:r)
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Dems kicking me out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
"House Democrats Demand McCarthy Take 'Immediate Action' On
Marjorie Taylor Greene"
Dear Peter,
They couldn't get me the first time. Or the
second time. Or the third time.
But once again, Democrats are cranking up
their calls to have me "punished."
You see, the Socialists in Congress sent a
letter to Kevin McCarthy demanding he take "immediate action" and
punish me.
STAND WITH MTG - SIGN YOUR STATEMENT OF
SUPPORT

AOC, Ilhan Omar, Corie Bush. . .they're all
making a move to have me removed from Congress once again.
Why? Because I'm not backing down or cowering
in fear to these Communists.
I'm standing up and fighting back against
their hate-America agenda.
And they hate me for it. So now, they want to
overturn my 2020 election and expel me from Congress
So I have a favor to ask:
If you stand with me, will you sign your "MTG
Statement of Support" right away to show these commies in
Congress how much support I have from WE THE PEOPLE!

I need your help to survive this battle for a
fourth time in just the last 5 months.
For the last six years, Democrats have called
Republicans: Nazis, Fascists, White Supremacists, and Enemies of
the State.
It's absurd Democrats accuse me of creating
an environment of harassment for speaking at a Trump rally and
defining them as who they are: Communists.
The truth is... Cori Bush harassed me and
it's on video, then lied to get a bigger office.
Marie Newperson harassed me with a taunting
video about her adult son.
The Democrat delegate from Guam harassed me
by using the National Guard and marched on my office.
I receive constant harassment in public
caused by the Democrat lies promoted by the media.
Democrats singled me out and kicked me off
committees for doing nothing wrong, and the death threats haven't
stopped since.
And now the witch hunt continues in an
attempt to overturn my 2020 election and kick me out of Congress.

But I won't back down from the Democrats. I
won't cave to the Fake News Media. I will never give up.
I will always keep fighting because I have
the support of the PEOPLE!
So please, sign your MTG Statement of Support
right away and show the Democrats you and I aren't going
anywhere!

For freedom,
Marjorie Taylor Greene

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

| | Friends, It is time to shine a light on one of the darkest moments in our history. The American people have a right to know exactly how and why the attack on the U.S. Capitol occurred. **I’m proud to have been appointed as one of the eight members of the House select committee tasked with investigating the events of January 6th.** I did not serve my country for 20 years in uniform to allow our nation’s most sacred ideals to be trampled in the name of blind partisanship. As a Navy veteran and as a member of Congress, I swore an oath to support and defend our Constitution against all enemies foreign and domestic. I will not abandon it. This is about our shared future — the future of our democracy and of our nation. We will seek the truth. I stand with you, Elaine Luria | | | [Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31742529/293612154/1560141552?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_210701_FR_Jan6Committee_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODE3OGI0MC05ZmRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nu6mmGQnp7fHtveZgetMXRDAMGopjoPl8nFRC9teSSQ=)

clean_body: | = | | Friends, It is time to shine a light on one of the darkest moments in our history. The American people have a right to know exactly how and why the attack on the U.S. Capitol occurred. I’m proud to have been appointed as one of the eight members of the House select committee tasked with investigating the events of January 6th. I did not serve my country for 20 years in uniform to allow our nation’s most sacred ideals to be trampled in the name of blind partisanship. As a Navy veteran and as a member of Congress, I swore an oath to support and defend our Constitution against all enemies foreign and domestic. I will not abandon it. This is about our shared future — the future of our democracy and of our nation. We will seek the truth. I stand with you, Elaine Luria | | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . body:

This letter marks the end of our very first fundraising quarter, and I could not be more grateful for the support we have received. Because of you, we were able to surpass our quarterly fundraising goals and have laid a strong foundation for a winning campaign.
That momentum is going to carry us through the summer and through the final months of 2021. Remember, 2022 is right around the corner!

| | Friend,

It has been my life goal to help people find freedom around the world.

>From being raised by Air Force veterans, becoming a high-school teacher, starting the Congressional International Religious Freedom Caucus, to founding Hardwired Global, and now my current mission.

My passion for service, freedom, and work with people worldwide has led me here.
---
| [I AM RUNNING FOR VIRGINIA’S 7TH CONGRESSIONAL SEAT](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=fa5fa4a62c&e=ae0ea222da "I AM RUNNING FOR VIRGINIA’S 7TH CONGRESSIONAL SEAT")

| As a single mother and business owner, I know what hard work looks like. And here’s what WE will be working towards:
* Protecting the Sanctity of Life
* Ensuring our Religious Freedom
* Opposing “Cancel Culture”
* Stopping Critical Race Theory and Promoting School Choice
* Reforming the System for our Veterans
* Defending the Second Amendment
* Securing our Election

name: Susan
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
With these resources, my campaign will be able to reach more voters and build a strong foundation for the 2022 election.

| Hi Peter,

I just want to say **thank you.**

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, **we hit our quarterly fundraising goal!**

With your help, we were able to show the GOP that we’re here to stay— and that grassroots support is more powerful than big money.

With these resources, my campaign will be able to reach more voters and build a strong foundation for the 2022 election. And because we hit our goal, I can spend less time worrying about fundraising and more time fighting for Pennsylvania.

We still have a long road ahead of us to winning in this highly competitive swing district, but I know together we can stand up to any challenge.

I am honored to have your support,

_Susan_

P.S. If you’d like to help us start our next quarter as strong as we finished the last, [_**you can click here to chip in.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31743552/293615562/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210701-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDljZjY3MS1hM2RhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wgtXwDmp28kqjX0qiye46QYbaJKCm5DUaTCBLAF0ASI=)

name: Thank Her (LeftAction)
subject: Thank Liz Cheney for Standing up to Trump and McCarthy
body:
Breaking: Liz Cheney basically tells McCarthy and Trump to go **** themselves, and agrees to serve on Capitol attack committee:
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [THANK LIZ CHENEY FOR AGREEING TO SERVE ON CAPITOL ATTACK COMMITTEE (AND FOR STANDING UP TO TRUMP & MCCARTHY)](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb49c5be-b719-45a7-be80-34e14b438499/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68ab3839-955c-4962-ab43-4fcfeeb174a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Hi Friend, We pretty much never agree with Liz Cheney on policy, but she’s one of the few Republicans to stand up to Trump, and also to GOP House Leader and **[talking weasel Kevin McCarthy](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdfd97730-f9b4-4580-98f4-252e4510f75b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** : _“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced Thursday she was appointing Republican Rep. Liz Cheney to the new select committee to investigate the January 6 attack on the US Capitol, placing one of former President Donald Trump's most vocal House Republican critics on the panel likely to investigate his role in the lead-up to the insurrection. "We are very honored and proud she has agreed to serve on the committee," Pelosi said at a news conference on Thursday. ([story](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a7dd9d5-ffef-4c93-b12a-6266a82784a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ This came after McCarthy, who is tall for a weasel, threatened to kick any Republican who agreed to serve on the Jan 6th committee off of all their other House committees. **[Please join us in thanking her: “Thank you, Representative Cheney!”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T684b6ce3-4eec-45f1-819b-1e87acdcde10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[****](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70edc72f-c7d9-431b-9240-e21a6eef2c96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Hello Peter! Democrat Mark Takano is a progressive champion in Congress, fighting to improve the lives of veterans, working families, and marginalized communities. Emails are our best tool to keep in touch with supporters, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31744278/293619858/-753271684?refcode=MTFC_202106XX_EMPET_I1_T0_NTL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTcyZjNlZi1hNmRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Gnlp0q7qyyEbFxQtTXBiTx0uLM-HUjqhHoeqFb57zA=&emci=26cf5c55-abc9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=fa72f3ef-a6da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18839602). Peter, I know that you receive a lot of emails from other campaigns, some of which ask for grassroots endorsements or donations. This is another email like that. **But first, I want to make sure that you know _who I am_ and _what I stand for._**

My family immigrated to the United States from Japan.

They worked their hearts out to make a life for us here, but it was never easy.

**My grandparents and parents were actually sent to Japanese American internment camps during World War II because of racist, nationalistic policies.**

I grew up in a working-class household in Southern California, and I went on to work as a public school teacher for many years.

I know firsthand how hard working-class Americans work to earn a living and provide for their families. So, when I ask for your support, please know that I never do so lightly.

I'm determined to spend my time serving my district, helping my constituents, and creating a more progressive country, but I can only do that with the help of grassroots supporters like you.

The truth is that this month I need 3,000 new endorsements from grassroots Democrats, to stand with me and help uplift progressive ideas in the Democratic Party.

[**So far today, we've only collected 28 new endorsements. Your personal endorsement would mean the world to me, Peter. So, now I'm asking you directly: Will you endorse my progressive campaign for Congress to join me and make a bold statement that good Democrats are ready to fight for our values? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31744280/293619860/-1864039396?refcode=MTFC_202106XX_EMPET_I1_T0_NTL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTcyZjNlZi1hNmRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Gnlp0q7qyyEbFxQtTXBiTx0uLM-HUjqhHoeqFb57zA=&emci=26cf5c55-abc9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=fa72f3ef-a6da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18839602) | [ADD MY ENDORSEMENT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31744281/293619861/-1864039396?refcode=MTFC_202106XX_EMPET_I1_T0_NTL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTcyZjNlZi1hNmRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Gnlp0q7qyyEbFxQtTXBiTx0uLM-HUjqhHoeqFb57zA=&emci=26cf5c55-abc9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=fa72f3ef-a6da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18839602)

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Recapping June
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends —

I wanted to pause for a moment to thank you for your support this past
month, and for being a part of this grassroots team.

We just wrapped up our big FEC fundraising deadline and my team and I
think our results are going to be great.

And that’s important because as my team and I have been saying, we’re
going through a Republican recall attempt in California — one that is led
by a collection of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and anti-immigrant far-right
Trump devotees. They pose a real threat to the progress we’re making here
in California and they’d love to defeat us and end our ability to fight
for a cleaner planet, immigration reform, or election security.

So just know that whenever you donate $5 or $10 it doesn’t just go into
the ether. Your support directly gives us the ability to go up against
these radical special interests who want to defeat us — so thank you, I
can’t imagine doing this without you.

But make no mistake, we still have a lot of work to do to shut down this
recall and defend this seat in 2022. This was a major hurdle we just
crossed but we still have more challenges that lie ahead.

But the good news is, there’s a lot of ways you can be involved in this
campaign. Whether you are donating or volunteering or adding your name to
support critical legislation like the For the People Act — every action
you take supports this campaign. And I want you to know that I’m so
grateful for everything you contribute to this team.

I’m comforted knowing that I have you all by my side, it really makes all
of the difference.

Warmly,

— Alex

If you’re able, please consider making a donation to help keep our
grassroots campaign going.

We need to keep up the pace in 2021, and anything you can afford to give
now will go a long way towards getting us off to a strong start in July.

Click below to chip in any amount!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21/?refcode=em210701-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=135_159979_jpw3nr&akid=135%2E159979%2Ejpw3nr ]DONATE NOW

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=135%2E159979%2Ejpw3nr

We just wrapped up our big FEC fundraising deadline and my team and I think our results are going to be great. And that’s important because as my team and I have been saying, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in California — one that is led by a collection of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees. They pose a real threat to the progress we’re making here in California and they’d love to defeat us and end our ability to fight for a cleaner planet, immigration reform, or election security.
