name: Mark Herring
subject: Today marijuana legalization goes into effect in Virginia!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ONE COMMONWEALTH PAC
body:
This was a hard fight, but also an important step in our ongoing journey towards real, meaningful criminal justice reform. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31744955/293623096/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTMwMDQyYS1hOGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHt6T6OQYIgeBI1_joiECifIBdTv6sgoTjNwXJ7kLxQ=&emci=08a1db36-a7da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1130042a-a8da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9499186) | Friends, Today, marijuana legalization goes into effect in Virginia! This was a hard fight, but also an important step in our ongoing journey towards real, meaningful criminal justice reform. Now it’s legal for adult recreational use in Virginia, and we became the first Southern state in the nation to do so. We are making history and so much progress! For too long, Virginia’s marijuana policies were not working, and they were disproportionately affecting Black and Brown Virginians, saddling them with criminal records that could negatively impact almost every aspect of their lives. Now, with the legalization of small amounts of marijuana, communities of color will no longer feel the disparate impacts of these old, outdated policies. I am so proud to have played a role in reforming Virginia’s marijuana policies, organizing the Virginia Cannabis Summit in 2019, and getting us on a path towards legalization. I want to thank all the advocates and partners who were integral in getting this important endeavor passed. Together, we can continue making even more bold progress like this, but we have to win the elections in Virginia this November! | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31744956/293623097/747295091?refcode=E10031-20210701-Marijuana-SB-CriminialJusticeReform-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTMwMDQyYS1hOGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHt6T6OQYIgeBI1_joiECifIBdTv6sgoTjNwXJ7kLxQ=)
---
Thank you!
\-- Mark Herring

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Big Win for Election Integrity
body:
| | | | This morning, the U.S. Supreme Court struck a blow for the integrity of elections and against ballot harvesting.
---
---
Dear Peter,
[_**This morning, the U.S. Supreme Court struck a blow for the integrity of elections and against ballot harvesting.**_](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNA3a7g0KkQviS9Cv4s1mDfXShXr4AL1off7B-2Fqnbo0o4SnZEQlq0TccNYBQgmMJx-2BOE52INiluKREB5ZgMzOIerc-3DHKfY_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhMgC5LtomTpJW6bQ4-2BF5gH4zjAoSNl76-2FeUXNxQC30pbieg-2BCv9OyIWK7cuqdE-2FRSg5FNfVpj3RKkueBnqq8fxL3oGJK16uLvAIZPQSJDSQQNwEAsyP58L1XlEIKa-2Fj6E4pWFAFK-2FbjU8BRwA2fnW6Jm68Z5rdLQUeOov-2FHf3XLuwVWf1iBkTTROwXG2CQxb4np3ar6Zbu-2F9QvwUkJxxiB3W9pcIxZvIlFgmF0LWw4N9MgTAH2x1jM0GxJ8-2B-2F3t64PSGAbTs2JFcDpkOgVDUeLcL9iYLp6S7x6inBwD2FRX3IU9d0KRedCp1SfgWgMD8sE-2F2KcstLfRbiepxp-2Bp57pjSowhiGNHrt-2Bw9eKmO32tmVkic87sGOohxbckeNCDNMRUv41Nj2CeUo3BfE-2BoY1XkPArSQIoBh5DoEaki27K92PK7Is11XlUO8btNEIboyRtYrQZlzacd7uS7ulV7GRRdbXwUOtFaLeUrkiu9cXy9yw80CTJGAZf2hnP0W7l7WuqSgCo4RG3xLfbGMFGqFNeJt-2BdgVKoUCiPW9iADwilmHuJPijTaezR-2FGd93SNHP8gDg9tpuTj-2BAV3GwaDhCuZ3g29blBU0CoYnqdxOqWy73-2FUfTP08DWzl2DljaXKOBCBbhv-2BmVuc1p28Hp0q1hzPnLWDBxZn94QLZJT-2FRk0vWl5tcTFC8M-2B2YV8ZUceSnNEAEpLoGdxDEYgvZSqssEldWGXPZsKaVCsdab9lkWTySZox-2BfjdnIiUB4qSOrHqgB6p6j7SzhUgta4Z90Mn0XLBhakucfrCg3AbX-2BAs04JwFN0Dyi5DDxhY9NZIrkoP-2Bl9fx60Hq9sjwSXgCJkSnM0YJ5uB1BzKOmz-2F9cr4pqsXlHkYSfY4oo789jEZXUKdPFgr4EfIcth6hw4QNDkBAc4oDs8TOV3NDIQVi3aF4lo1OEgcoP0YqCFWI2LIiEOPCgfA-3D)
I was proud to join a brief in this case supporting Arizona’s efforts.
Peter, election integrity matters. As Attorney General, I will keep fighting to ensure that every legal vote is counted and that America can once again have confidence in the voting process.
One immediate impact of this decision is that the Biden Justice Department attack on the recently enacted Georgia election integrity law will likely fail.
I will keep updating you on the latest with respect to election integrity. It’s certainly good to get another big win and prevail in our efforts to Defend America.
Finally, this win represents yet another example of what Republican attorneys general can do. With one-party rule operating in DC, it’s largely left to the AGs to hold the line and Defend America from the woke-left.
West Virginia and YOU are making a difference. Thank you for your support!
Sincerely,
---
---
---
Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia
---

clean_body: | | | | This morning, the U.S. Supreme Court struck a blow for the integrity of elections and against ballot harvesting. Dear Peter, I was proud to join a brief in this case supporting Arizona’s efforts. Peter, election integrity matters. As Attorney General, I will keep fighting to ensure that every legal vote is counted and that America can once again have confidence in the voting process. One immediate impact of this decision is that the Biden Justice Department attack on the recently enacted Georgia election integrity law will likely fail. I will keep updating you on the latest with respect to election integrity. It’s certainly good to get another big win and prevail in our efforts to Defend America. Finally, this win represents yet another example of what Republican attorneys general can do. With one-party rule operating in DC, it’s largely left to the AGs to hold the line and Defend America from the woke-left. West Virginia and YOU are making a difference. Thank you for your support! Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 == \-

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I wanted to reach out and personally thank you for your support this past month and for being a part of this team.
Whether you donated, shared our social media posts, or simply read our emails and stayed up to date with what’s going on — every action you take supports this ongoing mission for our shared values. And I want you to know that I’m extremely grateful for everything you do.
We just wrapped up our really important June FEC fundraising deadline — and my team is still combing over the numbers — but from what we can tell, our results are going to be great. And we have you to thank for that.
Now I won’t take up too much more of your time. Just know that the months ahead are going to be critical for building up this team so we can prepare to hold this seat in 2022. I look forward to what’s next knowing that I have you all by my side, it really makes all of the difference.
Full speed ahead,
— Mark
If you are able, please consider making a donation to help fuel our people-powered campaign.
We need to keep up the pace in 2021, and anything you can give will go a long way since we don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money.
We appreciate your support!
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210701-1-15&t=1&refcode2=902_6688874_jLs7ZT&akid=902%2E6688874%2EjLs7ZT)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=902%2E6688874%2EjLs7ZT).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: John Fetterman
subject: thank you, Peter!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I'm emailing you to share some *BIG* news for our campaign:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210701-1900-header&t=1&akid=1900%2E434096%2EJuI7D8)
**Thank you, Peter!**
Because of you and this team, we were able to hit our Q2 fundraising goal just a few hours ahead of last night's deadline. That's *BIG* news for our campaign. And it's a huge step towards finally flipping this crucial Senate seat blue.
It's hard to put into words just how humbled I am by our team. 😭 The support you've shown me, Gisele, and our entire family has honestly been incredible — and this past quarter was no exception.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21695?refcode=em20210701-1900&t=2&akid=1900%2E434096%2EJuI7D8)
Peter, I'm just so deeply grateful for all of it: Every volunteer, every contribution, and every message of encouragement — hell, I'm even thankful that you're taking time out of your busy day to read this message.
**Every person who's stepped up to become a key part of this people-powered movement makes me feel like the luckiest guy running for U.S. Senate.**
I hope I can make you proud. More soon and thanks again,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. The finance team is sending over Gisele and me a list of supporters who chipped in ahead of last night's deadline. **While our Q2 deadline may be behind us, I'd still *love* to sneak your name onto that list of donors we could call to say thank you.** Just don't go telling my campaign manager. [If you chip in any amount in response to this email, I'll be sure to add Peter Willis to that list, so thank you in advance.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21695?refcode=em20210701-1900&t=3&akid=1900%2E434096%2EJuI7D8) 🙏

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210701-1900-footer&t=4&refcode2=1900_434096_JuI7D8&akid=1900%2E434096%2EJuI7D8)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=1900%2E434096%2EJuI7D8)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1900%2E434096%2EJuI7D8)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: RE: today's disastrous Supreme Court ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lmk8vIuXQHLuk4yItuJyb8Nw0Yb%2FM3PW&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
The Supreme Court just issued a ruling on a major voting rights case - and grievously, as expected, the Court's right-wing majority ruled to further gut the Voting Rights Act and uphold state laws that make it more difficult to vote.
As Justice Kagan notes in her incisive dissent, this is a "tragic" decision - tragic in that "the Court has (yet again) rewritten - in order to weaken - a statute that stands as a monument to America's greatness, and protects against its basest impulses."
The Voting Rights Act (VRA) was designed to prevent racial discrimination in voting laws and ensure all Americans can participate in our democracy. Today's disastrous ruling doesn't just critically weaken the VRA - it gives a green light to Republican-led state legislatures across the country to continue their assault on voting rights and pass even more legislation making it harder to vote.
In the wake of today's disastrous ruling, it's clearer than ever that Congress must pass sweeping new legislation to strengthen voting rights. But the only way we can succeed is by eliminating the filibuster so that these bills can pass with a simple-majority vote - and it will take nothing short of a groundswell of grassroots action to make that happen.
Friend, supporters like you have stepped up many times before. You've urged the Senate to pass the For the People Act to protect voting rights. You've spoken out against the filibuster. But moments like this demand we keep speaking out until our democracy is protected.
**In the wake of this adverse ruling, I 'm counting on 1,000 members of this grassroots team to sign my new petition urging the Senate to abolish the filibuster and restore the VRA. Can I count on you to add your name before our midnight deadline?**
**[Sign on now to tell the Senate to end the filibuster to protect voting rights and our democracy!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-scotusvotingrights?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1047-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0721voting%3Fcode%3Djtk1047-su-nd)**
You have my word that I will fight my absolute hardest to ensure the filibuster is a thing of the past. But this is a fight that can only be won together - with unprecedented grassroots action. I appreciate you doing your part.
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1047-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=w2OcIDgGwSS6AtXdU6TMOcNw0Yb%2FM3PW&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

---
| | | [SIGN NOW](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c36b18eef1543be89db18a13d3bb26b&_e=tU6hau7qi4jU-u8lB82lchTa--w2B6e0YuWILKfpp0xtVxyEJuj9uJeYqVuJWX1qHt02C5OUw6WbGBgqivmMOgB4LEpLGM1Dn4namGr56DfbMr94bhPIH67wXAjA6LbDyszONmdlnngVva1oT9GnSsP_4g65tBKN3RxTJyGtne2WBgHTob8cAFcc-DxBf36rXPGJi-T9dWdewm824igxDyQRZjDzFlotNRgoYicoBPGQdLs46Nbeuhs4ep9JTQTo2Q9UMwdBPXMvm27xVoG9_yQQTmIopR25QyhyRKKo9S-kgwTkPvAWlWkrJf3cJZF1)

She then draped herself in a shirt that said "activist athlete." Later, she said, "**The anthem doesn't speak for me. It never has.''** POOR OPPRESSED GWEN, having to _suffer through the National Anthem_ while competing for a spot _on Team USA._ Newsflash, Gwen: representing the USA at the Olympics is a _privilege_. **If you don 't like this country, you don't DESERVE to represent us on the world stage.** **[Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c36b18eef1543be89db18a13d3bb26b&_e=tU6hau7qi4jU-u8lB82lchTa--w2B6e0YuWILKfpp0xtVxyEJuj9uJeYqVuJWX1qHt02C5OUw6WbGBgqivmMOgB4LEpLGM1Dn4namGr56DeHRELmO6GSN-qrkfmPAPJq7BbrLUWISixUOuCoYq63RyGSoYoK6gKsMb5T4T5OMiAjol7ia7nKSD2mMUKBCLVYG5xIAwY5FzHSPqTlb2wvI0mENgk2K828qU9vTooRSlOqhYs_u702CSY0cLdUAQbCnw0E315z4LNii4tXl9t1wC7WT_LUCJU4arFZB7FSwat_nICMZtVZrXBum5ZDYclc "Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA.")**

Peter, bad news.

We’ve been trying to reach you.

name: Kelly Hall
subject: Thanks - and some exciting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31747946/293631955/-177150127?refcode=em070121_khty_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTU0M2Q4Ni1iMmRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AE0H3KGt3w2NvS0BFdCprGcemdQgbECjBkmYIyjQfZw=) Hi team, Yesterday we faced a big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and with your help, we hit our grassroots fundraising goal. Thanks to all of you for chipping in, spreading the word about us, and supporting our work. We’ve only been able to win 20 people-powered ballot initiative campaigns for health care, higher wages, and paid leave thanks to this amazing grassroots team. _**Thank you!**_ I also wanted to share some exciting news: **today, Medicaid expansion officially begins in Oklahoma!** Last year, our campaign helped Oklahoma voters expand Medicaid at the ballot box after their politicians refused to act. And today, hundreds of thousands of hardworking Oklahomans can get the care they need. They’ll no longer have to choose between seeing a doctor and paying rent or putting food on the table. Friend, I’ll be honest: days like today are the most exciting moments at The Fairness Project. Our years of hard work -- organizing, building coalitions, collecting signatures, knocking on doors -- begin to pay off. **Thousands of lives will begin to change for the better this week, thanks to the work we all did together.** _To put it simply, elections matter._ I’m so grateful to have you alongside us in this work. Thanks for helping us change lives -- in Oklahoma and across the country. Onward,
Kelly Hall
Executive Director, The Fairness Project | **[Donate →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31747947/293631956/-177150127?refcode=em070121_khty_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTU0M2Q4Ni1iMmRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AE0H3KGt3w2NvS0BFdCprGcemdQgbECjBkmYIyjQfZw=)**

_Friend ー it’s Darin LaHood._

_Here’s the deal. _

_I didn’t make my_** _END OF QUARTER_** _goal yesterday, but I only missed it by_** _$127.89_** _!_

_I’ve just talked with my team, and they said we can extend our deadline until_** _MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. _**

_That means if we can get just_** _$3_**** __**_from everyone reading this email, we'll make the goal by tonight. _

_But if I don’t reach my goal, this seat could be taken by another open-border Democrat who will allow Biden’s Border Crisis to continue._

clean_body: It’s time to push back, Peter. | Big Tech is at it again, Peter. FIRST: Online firms like Google and Facebook started censoring conservative voices. THEN: They SILENCED President Trump -- depriving the sitting President of a key channel for exercising his First Amendment right. NOW: Facebook is actively asking its users to report their neighbors for “extremism.” See for yourself (below)! It’s true, Peter. Facebook is becoming the proverbial “Big Brother,” and they need to be reigned in before it’s too late. | | | | | | Online firms like Facebook have grown far too powerful, Peter. From their ivory towers in Silicon Valley, they manipulate our democracy and silence our conservative voices. | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

**__**** GOAL: 15,000 SIGNATURES BY MIDNIGHT ****__**
To: Our Cherished Postal Workers
From: Peter Willis MILLIONS of people rely on the Postal Service day in and day out for access to their much-needed mail.

And it could not be more clear to me: **Without you, this essential service would not be possible.**

I am just SO grateful you are making a REAL difference for Americans all across the country. **_THANK YOU!_**

**_And I want you to know that as Republicans wage all-out WAR against the Post Office, I STAND with our Postal Workers._**

**[That’s why I’m donating $1 to support your plight, strengthen our Post Offices, and oust Republicans.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31749315/293636280/-231755176?amount=1&refcode=UD_20210701_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmYmZkY2IzLWI3ZGEtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c3anAxfK8xqb8AzIUGZGJk5dG2zgkPhTexBr_ZrDeiU=)** | [DONATE $1 & SIGN ON NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31749318/293636284/-231755176?amount=1&refcode=UD_20210701_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmYmZkY2IzLWI3ZGEtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c3anAxfK8xqb8AzIUGZGJk5dG2zgkPhTexBr_ZrDeiU=)

clean_body: July 1 is National Postal Workers Day. | JULY 1 IS NATIONAL POSTAL WORKERS DAY = READ THE LETTER & ADD YOUR NAME: = | = GOAL: 15,000 SIGNATURES BY MIDNIGHT To: Our Cherished Postal Workers From: Peter Willis MILLIONS of people rely on the Postal Service day in and day out for access to their much-needed mail. And it could not be more clear to me: Without you, this essential service would not be possible. I am just SO grateful you are making a REAL difference for Americans all across the country. THANK YOU! And I want you to know that as Republicans wage all-out WAR against the Post Office, I STAND with our Postal Workers. = | = Donald Trump and his allies like Postmaster General Louis DeJoy are trying to DESTROY the Post Office from the inside out. From slashing post offices to eliminating good Postal Worker jobs, I find their actions absolutely HEINOUS. So I just want you to know that in spite of their actions, there are still REAL Americans who stand with Postal Workers. = = ** SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 to receive fewer emails. to update your information. name: Delina DiSanto
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress
body:
I am honored to have your support on this journey and I look forward to working together to get Paul Gosar out of office.

| **Thank you, friend.**

With the help of incredible grassroots supporters like you, we were able to give a strong showing in our campaign’s first FEC filing. This means that folks will be able to see that we’re a real threat to Paul Gosar’s reelection — and Gosar will see it, too.

I am honored to have your support on this journey and I look forward to working together to get Paul Gosar out of office. Together we can bring Arizonans the bold leadership we deserve.

Thank you!!

Delina

**P.S. You won't be hearing from us during the holiday weekend — please spend this time with loved ones, not checking your email! I hope you get to spend some time outdoors reflecting on our country's history and how we can continue fighting to ensure liberty and justice for all.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: People Are Flocking To The Republican Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
I wanted to share this op-ed from Paris Dennard with you. Paris is a national spokesman for the Republican National Committee..

http://www.indgop.org?mc_cid=c4dec272b5&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republicans,

I wanted to share this op-ed from Paris Dennard with you. Paris is a national spokesman for the Republican National Committee and was in town last week to help judge the capstone projects of our inaugural Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series class. Paris reflects on his experience with our class in this op-ed and shares our commitment to growing our party by engaging with communities that haven’t historically supported our party. The Indiana Diversity Leadership Series is one way we’ll do that and it is already starting to impact your Indiana Republican Party.

Thanks for reading,

Kyle

** People Are Flocking To The Republican Party
------------------------------------------------------------

The Carolinian
Op-Ed
RNC Spokesperson Paris Dennard
July 1, 2021
https://caro.news/people-are-flocking-to-the-republican-party/?mc_cid=c4dec272b5&mc_eid=UNIQID (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcaro.news%2Fpeople-are-flocking-to-the-republican-party%2F&data=04%7C01%7Cpdennard%40gop.com%7C057560d2a236423dfca908d93ca09ca9%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637607482787150403%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=u4Ob32PZSEKgmLKHix4AkvHv3DOZ2D24sDtj4mNHhx4%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=c4dec272b5&mc_eid=UNIQID)

The face and the base of the Republican Party is changing with the times – in a good way. That’s because we are appealing to an even broader cross-section of American voters who might have considered listening and learning more about the GOP for the first time because of the bold leadership of former President Trump. And some people are giving the GOP a second look because of many of the proposed and enacted policies last cycle with Republican leaders in Congress.

Whatever the reason people are coming into the fold of the GOP, we are ready to meet them where they are, listen to why they join the party, and keep them engaged. A great example is in the state of Indiana. Last weekend I had the opportunity to travel to Indianapolis to be an expert judge for the Indiana Republican Party Diversity Leadership Series (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=http%3A%2F%2Findiana.gop%2Fdiversity&data=04%7C01%7Cpdennard%40gop.com%7C057560d2a236423dfca908d93ca09ca9%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637607482787160400%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=6OFvHqYUn5Cb0bwCxR15ku%2BEl8%2B%2BK9Fr7a%2BUL9AKhNQ%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=c4dec272b5&mc_eid=UNIQID) Program.

Fifteen driven leaders (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=http%3A%2F%2Findiana.gop%2F2021diversity&data=04%7C01%7Cpdennard%40gop.com%7C057560d2a236423dfca908d93ca09ca9%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637607482787170393%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=DyOmT2WxMiogHEfLdsJxTWxgfePGLbFC82edLiYMsrU%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=c4dec272b5&mc_eid=UNIQID) from all over the state have been participating in this program, which is designed to train the next generation of diverse Republican leaders in Indiana. What was most impressive was the fact that it is a fully funded program with a full-time Director of Diversity and Engagement named Whitley Yates. Whitley was a member of the Republican National Committee’s Rising Stars Program a few years ago, and today she is a rising star in her home state.

Back in 2018 when the new Indiana State Chairman, Kyle Hupfer, took office he focused on the issue of growing the party and having meaningful engagement efforts to earn the trust and vote of minorities. The following year he hired Whitley and just one year later their inaugural program was up and running. RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel fully supported this effort because it was aligned with her national efforts to grow and expand our party in a substantive way, year-round. Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel announced a $2 million investment
(https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mcclatchydc.com%2Fnews%2Fpolitics-government%2Felection%2Farticle249428590.html&data=04%7C01%7Cpdennard%40gop.com%7C057560d2a236423dfca908d93ca09ca9%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637607482787170393%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=K7SjUfVCcPGkC8gWBJEqSZRKaUO5D84MEa70Wp2uhVg%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=c4dec272b5&mc_eid=UNIQID) to reopen RNC Black Community Centers across the country in target states like North Carolina. The centers are opening in the coming months, and they will truly be a resource for the community — not just during the Presidential election year but this year as well. Having an intentional and sustained presences with resources, staff and information is groundbreaking for an off-season political year.

The inaugural cohort’s capstone project required each team to select a local Republican-led bill or initiative and communicate how it positively impacts communities of color. They presented a robust data-filled presentation that could be shared with minority audiences. The presentations ranged from programs about access to a Pre-K program (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.in.gov%2Ffssa%2Fcarefinder%2Fon-my-way-pre-k%2F%3Futm_source%3Dgoogle%26utm_medium%3Dcpc%26utm_campaign%3D2021-enrollment%26utm_content%3D0&data=04%7C01%7Cpdennard%40gop.com%7C057560d2a236423dfca908d93ca09ca9%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637607482787180390%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=lUcyYrpWizDg0xwPhBUN%2Fy1yutomSRM6kmvSZ59LnHg%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=c4dec272b5&mc_eid=UNIQID) for children, a new police reform law
(https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fapnews.com%2Farticle%2Findianapolis-police-indiana-bills-police-reform-03a8c2f5c9c927ec151b4dc0a5768d2c&data=04%7C01%7Cpdennard%40gop.com%7C057560d2a236423dfca908d93ca09ca9%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637607482787180390%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=CHGlUcmrjSh6n9VgqmobclsGNndYXOBeoggzPqBQBig%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=c4dec272b5&mc_eid=UNIQID) that bans the chokehold, a youth-focused workforce development
(https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.newsandtribune.com%2Fnews%2Findiana-bill-will-allow-young-people-to-work-without-affecting-family-tanf-benefits%2Farticle_f87453e0-af67-11eb-ad3d-8f2dd6398e03.html&data=04%7C01%7Cpdennard%40gop.com%7C057560d2a236423dfca908d93ca09ca9%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637607482787190380%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=%2FQBE0dzCdFcobmGA5ye2F8W50owe5dlMmruFupRdOg0%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=c4dec272b5&mc_eid=UNIQID) program for the children of lower-income residents and a program designed to help reduce adult recidivism.

I learned so much about what was being done in the state. They have a tremendous opportunity to spread the word in their communities about how Republican leadership has had a positive impact on the lives of so many of Indiana’s Black residents. The good thing is Indiana is not alone. North Carolina’s Republican Party has been working to engage minority voters under the leadership of Chairman Michael Whatley. His entire team is serious about showing up and being consistently present in communities of color –especially the Black community with their engagement effort (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fblackvoices.nc.gop%2F&data=04%7C01%7Cpdennard%40gop.com%7C057560d2a236423dfca908d93ca09ca9%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637607482787200377%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=An8voltL4s6wuWk6WZc%2BYKuFPVT9Qzf7UhmDMSb8M38%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=c4dec272b5&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

The cohort in Indiana was passionate about their projects, not because they were being paid or getting an award. It was clear they truly cared about finding ways to better engage a broader audience, because they truly want the best for their communities. They believe, as I do, that conservative values, policies, and programs can offer a more empowering forecast for a safer and prosperous future for all Americans.

My takeaway is while there is always more work to be done, more conversations to be had and more opportunities to show up and be present, the Republican party is on the right track, and I am proud to see the national and local efforts growing and expanding every day. It will take a concerted effort to listen before speaking and to find political common ground. Democrats are not doing this type of engagement because they have grown too comfortable, simply expecting to get most of the Black vote without having to work hard for it. Democrats have long taken Black Americans for granted, and it is time to hold them accountable while being open to hearing different perspectives to get better results. The Republican Party is the party of freedom and opportunity, and we will continue to share our inclusive and empowering polices, engage, grow for the better, and win elections by putting all Americans first.

Paris Dennard is the National Spokesperson and Director of Black Media Affairs for the Republican National Committee (RNC). Follow him on Twitter: @PARISDENNARD.

clean_body: I wanted to share this op-ed from Paris Dennard with you. Paris is a national spokesman for the Republican National Committee.. Hoosier Republicans, I wanted to share this op-ed from Paris Dennard with you. Paris is a national spokesman for the Republican National Committee and was in town last week to help judge the capstone projects of our inaugural Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series class. Paris reflects on his experience with our class in this op-ed and shares our commitment to growing our party by engaging with communities that haven’t historically supported our party. The Indiana Diversity Leadership Series is one way we’ll do that and it is already starting to impact your Indiana Republican Party. Thanks for reading, Kyle People Are Flocking To The Republican Party The Carolinian Op-Ed RNC Spokesperson Paris Dennard July 1, 2021 () The face and the base of the Republican Party is changing with the times – in a good way. That’s because we are appealing to an even broader cross-section of American voters who might have considered listening and learning more about the GOP for the first time because of the bold leadership of former President Trump. And some people are giving the GOP a second look because of many of the proposed and enacted policies last cycle with Republican leaders in Congress. Whatever the reason people are coming into the fold of the GOP, we are ready to meet them where they are, listen to why they join the party, and keep them engaged. A great example is in the state of Indiana. Last weekend I had the opportunity to travel to Indianapolis to be an expert judge for the Indiana Republican Party Diversity Leadership Series () Program. Fifteen driven leaders () from all over the state have been participating in this program, which is designed to train the next generation of diverse Republican leaders in Indiana. What was most impressive was the fact that it is a fully funded program with a full-time Director of Diversity and Engagement named Whitley Yates. Whitley was a member of the Republican National Committee’s Rising Stars Program a few years ago, and today she is a rising star in her home state. Back in 2018 when the new Indiana State Chairman, Kyle Hupfer, took office he focused on the issue of growing the party and having meaningful engagement efforts to earn the trust and vote of minorities. The following year he hired Whitley and just one year later their inaugural program was up and running. RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel fully supported this effort because it was aligned with her national efforts to grow and expand our party in a substantive way, year-round. Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel announced a $2 million investment () to reopen RNC Black Community Centers across the country in target states like North Carolina. The centers are opening in the coming months, and they will truly be a resource for the community — not just during the Presidential election year but this year as well. Having an intentional and sustained presences with resources, staff and information is groundbreaking for an off-season political year. The inaugural cohort’s capstone project required each team to select a local Republican-led bill or initiative and communicate how it positively impacts communities of color. They presented a robust data-filled presentation that could be shared with minority audiences. The presentations ranged from programs about access to a Pre-K program () for children, a new police reform law () that bans the chokehold, a youth-focused workforce development () program for the children of lower-income residents and a program designed to help reduce adult recidivism. I learned so much about what was being done in the state. They have a tremendous opportunity to spread the word in their communities about how Republican leadership has had a positive impact on the lives of so many of Indiana’s Black residents. The good thing is Indiana is not alone. North Carolina’s Republican Party has been working to engage minority voters under the leadership of Chairman Michael Whatley. His entire team is serious about showing up and being consistently present in communities of color –especially the Black community with their engagement effort () . The cohort in Indiana was passionate about their projects, not because they were being paid or getting an award. It was clear they truly cared about finding ways to better engage a broader audience, because they truly want the best for their communities. They believe, as I do, that conservative values, policies, and programs can offer a more empowering forecast for a safer and prosperous future for all Americans. My takeaway is while there is always more work to be done, more conversations to be had and more opportunities to show up and be present, the Republican party is on the right track, and I am proud to see the national and local efforts growing and expanding every day. It will take a concerted effort to listen before speaking and to find political common ground. Democrats are not doing this type of engagement because they have grown too comfortable, simply expecting to get most of the Black vote without having to work hard for it. Democrats have long taken Black Americans for granted, and it is time to hold them accountable while being open to hearing different perspectives to get better results. The Republican Party is the party of freedom and opportunity, and we will continue to share our inclusive and empowering polices, engage, grow for the better, and win elections by putting all Americans first. Paris Dennard is the National Spokesperson and Director of Black Media Affairs for the Republican National Committee (RNC). Follow him on Twitter: @PARISDENNARD. ============================================================ Twitter () Facebook () Website (www.indgop.org) Google Plus () Instagram () YouTube () Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
Americans shouldn't be penalized for living in areas that lack access to personal banking. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux0XuBPi_gdBc8CETHNwlzmI8ljlXRQ4Ipbd611kXVHghL8FaDFlazmcMW6JyDx5yEHokdPNhJBLCe6_rlK9Pk4I_65fF2rZEdhk6rnh1dWiSzN6P3lFbgapl87uEBTkq7fWCZ5TEwR1s1XYU-yTVzXIRbQZFuB32TDAj0uo0ZtgHGKdUwDQUVhw2urJTEEjaCEhBPK0mdfbHSJ-oO1PPbaQ7f9gj_dh50eeFG5e6kQktzqYq6MxFe46UPjZTwZbgOq7Y-FPXPK_w679FR4E0baN6wCPgIUB5ng0g_y-W_yBmJ32hCeeffx-zBuVRsTfeayVfKG5tH5feaI58PI7lYbzRevNHad0g3qjC6qukMbCx/3d8/2N7QMu5eQlOjxID8m5NTRQ/h0/o8qeFIth1vCTRtOzqWC-3e3dPlpKSS_dptKJI0qgR_M)

| | Friend,

On National Postal Worker Day, I’d like to express my gratitude to our mail carriers and post office staff for serving our communities and keeping us connected when we needed it the most.

The pandemic underscored the key role of postal workers during times of crisis, showing us once again just how much Americans rely on the U.S. Postal Service for the timely delivery of life-saving medicine, mail-in ballots, and time-sensitive paperwork.They carried out this crucial work despite interference from Trump and the henchman he put in charge, Louis DeJoy.

**Protecting and strengthening the Postal Service is more urgent than ever. That is why in Congress, I have been fighting for a Postal Banking program that would secure additional funding for USPS, and expand financial services in rural and urban areas where Americans are being left behind by banks and lenders.**

Under this Postal Banking program, USPS would receive the funds required to meet the needs of the people -- providing them with essential services such as access to a surcharge-free ATM, check cashing, bill payment, and more.

**[As families struggle to recover from the economic crisis caused by the pandemic, it is critical that we strengthen the Postal Service and improve access to affordable financial services everywhere. Can you donate $20 to our campaign today to help us deliver policies that will help working Americans?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux0XuBPi_gdBc8CETHNwlzmI8ljlXRQ4Ipbd611kXVHghL8FaDFlazmcMW6JyDx5yEO3uaKrA2OEDJlOSMvItHM0iPr9UmumRSYdvCjWxWoutuqdRRLF6gHznU1wMqdIjOzaGJzYoXcykmSiGPdbZCk0ULO8t5f3Eeihbh4XbExK6H4EXGMjtLwD8Xdu5E7-FpWOcpBOd1m7XdqF2Lyv9kvAE3rwNfvZHBozkMAft02ev6VRn5_niqsoiWr9Z_GhlwVISeD8Nt0Jva_smVn0WGX8HWBRKt6X8fEgEN2DUmmUHHIjtTB7EcnD0DuDrsrnFOaHz9AY745A_KSpR2SGYyNLNE_OOEXv_hujVRc4YDd0373zs88rr_MqQ1_tOjR95rg/3d8/2N7QMu5eQlOjxID8m5NTRQ/h1/BCkXVIH57bUC6omEQzJdbmf1f4ZNOQo-Ucq6A0oP5wQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**Donate $10 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdKKQ8_q_i-5MU1_3bqsfJJXb2_cF42y73OGBw1aalEe8G29oUnv-pyhCEQmyczQmWgEzUGAA-r339C2wkkCt2zpArPnfYx6pDPCbP0f3dhyqvWKgW0gMbbX6vbWvfHJK9Va6FlfAT0SvqGlqeiqoY1nnKzlqcAAQeD0Jq6H-Mvlk0aVOQ92IGND3fkRH9rSpPwXyJy2RPzTzubLtJrlFUM0ozi2J1l8IJXqh_RApLwM16aF-eNUQFC36F9QDUynpcjQ_hDpLUFw0EvqnPJBz7jAA_knWtK_UuCxzXuE0VnYqFUdv1idu-YQ0du4uMksWbr1TBjXj2SBnOKhgJOe7kum7Q87gdaNsRlUULy3k079wFPOjW8tlF5B7u6Heeb2Qnc/3d8/2N7QMu5eQlOjxID8m5NTRQ/h2/-Em9M3EV2VJSJNzt2XKWKloutld5XorPiiSvZ7dDOrs)

clean_body: Americans shouldn't be penalized for living in areas that lack access to personal banking. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, On National Postal Worker Day, I’d like to express my gratitude to our mail carriers and post office staff for serving our communities and keeping us connected when we needed it the most. The pandemic underscored the key role of postal workers during times of crisis, showing us once again just how much Americans rely on the U.S. Postal Service for the timely delivery of life-saving medicine, mail-in ballots, and time-sensitive paperwork.They carried out this crucial work despite interference from Trump and the henchman he put in charge, Louis DeJoy. Protecting and strengthening the Postal Service is more urgent than ever. That is why in Congress, I have been fighting for a Postal Banking program that would secure additional funding for USPS, and expand financial services in rural and urban areas where Americans are being left behind by banks and lenders. Under this Postal Banking program, USPS would receive the funds required to meet the needs of the people -- providing them with essential services such as access to a surcharge-free ATM, check cashing, bill payment, and more. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Thank you for your confidence and support, \-- Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? ****** | **** **** **** **** | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress P.O. Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697, United States | | | | Sent via . name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
subject: The Tide Is Turning . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by the Republican Party of Texas P
body:
The tide is turning. Texas just picked up TWO new congressional seats for the 2022 midterm elections. _And, along with Texas, reliably "red" states like Florida, North Carolina, and Montana also picked up a handful of seats._ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57849554:JUkBQWl4N:m:1:3253819041:19F735D8973C37A0C2FBCF482758BD7F:r) In other words, we are within striking distance of taking back the House in 2022 and retiring Nancy Pelosi for good. **_[Will you contribute just $2 to the Republican Party of Texas today to help us win these two critical seats in the upcoming midterm election?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57849554:JUkBQWl4N:m:1:3253819041:19F735D8973C37A0C2FBCF482758BD7F:r)_** I know that it seems like bleak times for the conservative movement. But do not forget about what happened in 2020. Even with the highly dubious election procedures, Big Tech censorship, and tidal wave of fake news - Republicans came up just 5 seats short of taking back the House. Now, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and their progressive socialist minions know that their time in power is fleeting. _That is why they have spent the last six months aggressively ramming their transformative socialist policies through Congress._ We must capitalize on the momentum we gained in 2020 by winning these two new seats and inspiring the rest of the nation to reject the socialist policies of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer. **_[And, that starts with your small gift of just $2 to the Republican Party of Texas today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57849554:JUkBQWl4N:m:1:3253819041:19F735D8973C37A0C2FBCF482758BD7F:r)_** Your contribution of just $2 or more today comes at a critical time. There are only a few days left in the 2nd fundraising quarter of the year, and we **_must_** keep up with the massive Democrat fundraising machine pouring millions of dollars into these new congressional districts. Your gift today will give us the resources needed to recruit, train, and elect strong conservatives who will _fight_ and _win_ to advance our conservative, America-first values. **_[That is why I am asking you to send a contribution of $2 or more right away.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57849554:JUkBQWl4N:m:1:3253819041:19F735D8973C37A0C2FBCF482758BD7F:r)_** I am counting on you and patriots from across America to help us retire Nancy Pelosi and take back control of the House of Representatives once and for all. Thank you in advance for your timely support. Steadfast and Loyal, Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.) Chairman, Republican Party of Texas **#WeAreTheStorm**

**I’m so proud of what this campaign has achieved this past month:**
* We officially -- and successfully -- launched our campaign to defeat Republican Madison Cawthorn.

* We’ve talked to SO MANY folks in Western North Carolina about our mission -- and listened to the concerns of our community.

* And we’ve received more than one thousand online donations from generous grassroots supporters (like you!) to propel this campaign to victory!

In light of what we’ve built, I wanted to take a moment to thank you, for your unwavering support of our movement.

Make no mistake: **Without grassroots Democrats like you, this campaign wouldn’t be possible.**

Thank you for joining our fight to defeat Republican Madison Cawthorn and replace him with a leader who will fight for the community.

I'm humbled by the support and faith you've given us.

name: Chuck Rocha, Nuestro PAC
subject: We are democracy's lifeline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nuestro PAC
body:
The Supreme Court set a precedent today for states across the country trying to pass repressive voting bills.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31751123/293641699/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2NWZiMzE0LWMwZGEtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CovEP6qZzHiolpuRtQLvxFI4A9Vooxha9d7nqXtu0es=)

Friends -
We have been called to be democracy's lifeline again.
Today, the Supreme Court of the United States ruled that Arizona's voter suppression bill is constitutional, setting a precedent for states across the country trying to pass similar - if not more repressive - bills.
**[Read the opinion here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31751125/293641700/1684171945?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2NWZiMzE0LWMwZGEtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CovEP6qZzHiolpuRtQLvxFI4A9Vooxha9d7nqXtu0es=&emci=0a2f706a-b6da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=465fb314-c0da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7684583).**
We are seeing the Voting Rights Act of 1965 diminished to nothing in real time.
Bills across the country disguised as "election integrity" __will__ disproportionately affect minority voters' access to the ballot box. There is no denying that Latinos turned out in record numbers in 2020, and Republicans are scared of what this means for their future.
I won't beat around the bush: this decision from the Supreme Court is a big victory for Republicans. They have proven they are willing to do anything to make sure their party can continue winning elections even if it means taking away your power.
Our response must be quick and mighty if we are going to take on these powerful voter suppression tactics.

[**Help us by pitching in today to fund our outreach movement.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31751132/293641701/-1551089125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2NWZiMzE0LWMwZGEtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CovEP6qZzHiolpuRtQLvxFI4A9Vooxha9d7nqXtu0es=)

Any amount you can contribute helps mobilize voters early in battleground states like Arizona that are ctitical to protecting Democrats' majorities in 2022.
In Solidarity,
Chuck Rocha

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Celebrating our freedom while standing up for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
This holiday weekend, let us remember that we have to protect the right to vote

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31751510/293642695/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzlmNmNkMy1jMWRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lK63tIlypSQtAxa1DaW18XbQAa58lVwkugE4ggyZ7IY=&emci=41dffa74-aada-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=479f6cd3-c1da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend - Between honoring our fallen soldiers on Memorial Day, to celebrating the emancipation of enslaved Black people on Juneteenth, to commemorating America’s independence on the Fourth of July, one word remains top of mind for most during this time of the year -- freedom.

I know that we still have not achieved true freedom for every person in this country, and there’s still much work to be done. Right now, as we gather with our families and friends to celebrate and reflect on these important days in our history, we must recognize that **the freedom to vote is under attack**.

Together, though, we can stop it.

The team at Fair Fight Action is working every day to fight back against this assault on our freedom. [_**Will you chip in today to ensure that they can continue this vital work? Any little bit goes a long way.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31751511/293642696/-2114502549?refcode=IE070121FREE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzlmNmNkMy1jMWRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lK63tIlypSQtAxa1DaW18XbQAa58lVwkugE4ggyZ7IY=)

This weekend as we celebrate our country’s independence, we must also celebrate our democracy. So many sacrifices have been made to ensure the American people have the right to vote in free and fair elections, so while we join together in celebration, our work cannot slow down.

I am so grateful to have you on our team, friend. I hope you enjoy time with the people you love this weekend, and remember - we can do this together.

-Stacey [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31751512/293642697/-2114502549?refcode=IE070121FREE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzlmNmNkMy1jMWRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lK63tIlypSQtAxa1DaW18XbQAa58lVwkugE4ggyZ7IY=) |
---|---|---

body:
I just wanted to send you a quick thank you.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31752115/293644556/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2I3MjVmOC1jNGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTiUpzxwY_Jy8bBEGqz-BdtuZObgzKtegRMOOmCQkT0=)

Peter — I just wanted to send you a quick thank you.

**Because of your phenomenal support my campaign was able to reach our fundraising goal just in time for our end of quarter deadline.**

We simply could not have done this without every one of our supporters, each dollar donated, every petition signed, and everything you have done for us in between.

Your support is _critical_ to stopping Republicans from taking our House majority and destroying all our progress.

And we just can’t allow that to happen. Right now is a watershed moment for our democracy.

Trump and his MAGA Republicans have damaged our nation greatly and it will take time to rebuild. But if MAGA Republicans get back in power, we won’t be able to do anything.

[**The fight never stops -- Peter, if you haven’t already, could you chip in $3 to jump into July with running start? name: Jay Inslee
subject: I’m profoundly thankful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
From the bottom of my heart, thank you.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/vW8jMVmmR9HY/SkNlT2lXTWowNWQwRXJJTklzTUVTejl4WUVUUWdKSmUyRzNsbTV0eENrZ0trbnlYNTBmMUVjdlZ4V3BycWZVVDRhUXpiajlMcGQ0SGlQVlhKZUpaWHZacm9MdGdpWEVZRmd6Y1NtaU9uM0E9S0/OXlVNFNPUzVCaE5xRHhNT2k1QlhqTlFLSERnQVlObWR1eW9odEVTOWJSbz0S1) Friend, Our end-of-month deadline has officially passed. Thanks to all of you who chipped in, we reached our goal (and then some). I know you have a lot of choices about how to spend your money, especially with summer underway and businesses opening back up. To everyone who made the choice to invest in our work now: **Thank you.** As July begins, we mark a new chapter for our state and our country. Our economy is opening back up. Lives are returning to a new normal. Together, the choices we made over the last 18 months saved thousands of lives and made Washington state a model for the nation on how to respond to the pandemic. But it wasn't easy. Far from it. So as we reopen, we will continue our charge to increase vaccination rates, while continuing to listen to the scientists and put the health and safety of our people first. I want to extend an especially profound thanks to the health care workers, first responders, store clerks, teachers, and other essential workers who masked up, showed up, and saw us through this pandemic -- and we know your work isn't over. Thanks to you and the more than 150 million Americans (including millions here in Washington state) who've gotten vaccinated, we saved countless lives -- and as of yesterday, Washington state is officially, fully reopened for business. It's been a long road to get to this point, but we did it together. Thank you for being on this journey with me and for all the progress you make possible. Very truly yours, Jay | [DONATE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/mPwjhRaaVqBj/SkNlT2lXTWowNWQwRXJJTklzTUVTejl4WUVUUWdKSmUyRzNsbTV0eENrZ0trbnlYNTBmMUVjdlZ4V3BycWZVVDRhUXpiajlMcGQ0SGlQVlhKZUpaWHZacm9MdGdpWEVZRmd6Y1NtaU9uM0E9S0/OXlVNFNPUzVCaE5xRHhNT2k1QlhqTlFLSERnQVlObWR1eW9odEVTOWJSbz0S1)
---

Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111

name: Candace Owens
subject: ✍️ [Petition] BAN anti-American athletes from Olympics >>
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57849578:65Q4sWlNx:m:1:3253819041:E89F0222BEE5F7EC6A2CE541CFB6F784:r)
---
| Peter,
---
| Over the weekend, American athlete **Gwen Berry _turned her back_ on the American flag and National Anthem** after winning a spot to represent Team USA at the Summer Olympics. **[I need you to sign our petition](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57849578:65Q4sWlNx:m:1:3253819041:E89F0222BEE5F7EC6A2CE541CFB6F784:r "I need you to sign our petition")** **DEMANDING** the U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee: **[BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this summer.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57849578:65Q4sWlNx:m:1:3253819041:E89F0222BEE5F7EC6A2CE541CFB6F784:r "BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this
summer.")**
---
| | | [SIGN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57849578:65Q4sWlNx:m:1:3253819041:E89F0222BEE5F7EC6A2CE541CFB6F784:r)
---
| After winning 3rd place _and_ a spot at the Olympics during the U.S. Track and Field Trials, **Gwen literally _turned away_ from the American flag** as "The Star-Spangled Banner" played. She then draped herself in a shirt that said "activist athlete." Later, she said, "**The anthem doesn't speak for me. It never has.''** POOR OPPRESSED GWEN, having to _suffer through the National Anthem_ while competing for a spot _on Team USA._ Newsflash, Gwen: representing the USA at the Olympics is a _privilege_. **If you don 't like this country, you don't DESERVE to represent us on the world stage.** **[Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57849578:65Q4sWlNx:m:1:3253819041:E89F0222BEE5F7EC6A2CE541CFB6F784:r "Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA.")**

---
| Thanks,

Candace

"I need you to sign our petition" DEMANDING the U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee: "BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this summer." | | | | After winning 3rd place and a spot at the Olympics during the U.S. Track and Field Trials, Gwen literally turned away from the American flag as "The Star-Spangled Banner" played. She then draped herself in a shirt that said "activist athlete." Later, she said, "The anthem doesn't speak for me. It never has.'' POOR OPPRESSED GWEN, having to suffer through the National Anthem while competing for a spot on Team USA. Newsflash, Gwen: representing the USA at the Olympics is a privilege. If you don 't like this country, you don't DESERVE to represent us on the world stage. "Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA." | | | | Thanks, Candace This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-41978634612-echo7-986E0BF02B58C99AABFDDF9138D32D44@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: John Castorani
subject: Re: The Anti-American Olympic athlete
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Congress
body:
Olympic athlete Gwen Berry turned her back to the American flag the moment she qualified for the Olympics. We need to make sure she has too many flagsFor six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=fe7200cbabaf423eae7a0a4e68248348&_t=z2v3UrVt6sVCOaGpu9AaNkILU7sGkj3GE-i8NNE3cI35fsHPH4unIw3gJe2m-cOMXSg-O3eZIIJQOFkYp18tT7F064fsp52VYaUEYxCb4Bpm1nreDlQD8Tow6T2xp2bDvKwaL3EwlD6zKkVQr-H5o9iclwMegAm6hwAholJvc8M%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fe7200cbabaf423eae7a0a4e68248348&_e=AFzoXJdBRTJRvgkOvgVQrERuIUuvJCtplX-88o8wlwZcCDrz8qZLkq5YgsVs0RA99XREeayb-HRGXirCWdM-jmL9Rz6JR_tXmd9NNdRrg5bkHQTPjgRuaTj4IrLe87oSmyqkLkwlIzyt95l77SdNoVPMhAJanxOAA-mZPzignVDMNE4b8bMZHX9wYx5eUtCKRRaVttPHR04xv8VG5uh4pdHKRh9soSn_Mo7RTLxshL_hsfKERG8kehofrytX2u04dBWxK1WWe7CXJDRCypUSMq4q6C7ttgIxj_dmVyNdm1ksqyA10Od2LdDq6CRLmD5UEaL6d-GbSco_t97k1S3QOqcrTc-MHhPM_0Rbp_zE9ljNgQ2oPLyfbyN8124oPfpeNPPv8R9z5yv7mKAbk7fhFRBUBnm4AgBK8yCVZPPWHn0%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

For 11 years, I proudly wore the American flag on my arm as a member of the Army’s Special Operations Command. During each of my seven deployments, Old Glory was a constant companion; every morning that I woke up, **the American flag was one of the first things I set my eyes on** – at the end of the day, our flag was one of the last things I would look at before going to sleep.

**I wore the stars and stripes proudly as my team and I hunted the Islamic terrorists who attacked the American compound in Benghazi and killed Ambassador Chris Stevens**.

As a Targeting officer within the Intelligence Community, I _**proudly**_ wore the stars and stripes on my right arm as my team and I hunted and neutralized terrorists on the Arabian Peninsula, terrorists who were hired by Iran to wreak havoc on freedom-loving people everywhere.

My name is John Castorani. I’m a proud veteran, father, husband, and most important of all: I’m a proud American. **I love this country so damn much that I left a career in the intelligence community to run for Congress, because honestly, just look at the people representing us right now.**

So, when I recently read in the paper that Olympic athlete Gwen Berry turned away from the American flag after qualifying to represent the United States in Tokyo later this month, **it made my blood boil**.

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fe7200cbabaf423eae7a0a4e68248348&_e=AFzoXJdBRTJRvgkOvgVQrERuIUuvJCtplX-88o8wlwZcCDrz8qZLkq5YgsVs0RA99XREeayb-HRGXirCWdM-jmL9Rz6JR_tXmd9NNdRrg5bkHQTPjgRuaTj4IrLe87oSmyqkLkwlIzyt95l77SdNoVPMhAJanxOAA-mZPzignVDMNE4b8bMZHX9wYx5eUtCKCZc9jfS7iUp-WIwOE0QJovlSzywlu3x9EZH-IFDXmiC6xmRcoQ-bzDnkGn1EBDMaVojYASfFSshJOd2m2iA0HFueqpfB12EKKNUhpWcink-nafLVIkRyDJfmfXkFz74Z8iGSpUViyrmyN_DKOAnfKtGK7EqjMT5T0_dxVOu2Wh2Xue7Pc1cCcfkaLAgh_2yVQr6EyDAJbZEm1tgvG68kcu94n1b1l2RSjSYd2reAZcc%3D) _Gwen Berry turning her back to the American flag following Olympic trials on June 26th_

**[This morning, I had an idea and I’m hoping you’ll chip in a few dollars to help me out](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fe7200cbabaf423eae7a0a4e68248348&_e=AFzoXJdBRTJRvgkOvgVQrERuIUuvJCtplX-88o8wlwZcCDrz8qZLkq5YgsVs0RA99XREeayb-HRGXirCWdM-jmL9Rz6JR_tXmd9NNdRrg5bkHQTPjgRuaTj4IrLe87oSmyqkLkwlIzyt95l77SdNoVPMhAJanxOAA-mZPzignVDMNE4b8bMZHX9wYx5eUtCKay522RmxwEpLLRA2Rfm_SXapH6Y4alrrwFTV_Br0P9xiw4uoVdAf4WvuyN8dU_Oma8ebtoQx0jfdxFuumE58GVrVMrx55VrCglLrVTHuowSmqayznahu58mfBMDi6TYwkDmGl98svqhxbNl9Lx0cc8CQLxggXWxVyOs0d2I26Twq-n3p83c2shhNcCO1kETPdaHQgrHKif5X9AWsgLUi9CmABO9EaXXjTB6LoY1wQps%3D)**. If Ms. Berry wants to turn her back to the American flag, let’s send as many American flags as money can buy to the United States Olympic Committee in her name. I can buy a flag from a veteran owned flag manufacturer for $2.40. **[For every donation of $5 more to my campaign, I’ll send an American Flag to Gwen Berry](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fe7200cbabaf423eae7a0a4e68248348&_e=AFzoXJdBRTJRvgkOvgVQrERuIUuvJCtplX-88o8wlwZcCDrz8qZLkq5YgsVs0RA99XREeayb-HRGXirCWdM-jmL9Rz6JR_tXmd9NNdRrg5bkHQTPjgRuaTj4IrLe87oSmyqkLkwlIzyt95l77SdNoVPMhAJanxOAA-mZPzignVDMNE4b8bMZHX9wYx5eUtCK79LBEzFsr8e6iHWHhCaZ1URk7qmci7HcNvNQS2zHJPcg9p3uqADojrAfojvR4tJao-cez9JX2YYlNapsnyfWd4zD-21qLRICD2-1eNwfTFVUv4UGMn9_9adI8PAv7C1jfgJEDuNay3NLVPVzRyhxGCoCfpbyAdq-OOJqkKLymF0vgNosQqEgerUITYJvRuCQnUMoCrp0SKHrj9ZpyakWoCAmh0hz5u-JMbE03e_alf0%3D)**.
| [**STAND WITH ME AND OLD GLORY
SEND A FLAG TO GWEN BERRY ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fe7200cbabaf423eae7a0a4e68248348&_e=AFzoXJdBRTJRvgkOvgVQrERuIUuvJCtplX-88o8wlwZcCDrz8qZLkq5YgsVs0RA99XREeayb-HRGXirCWdM-jmL9Rz6JR_tXmd9NNdRrg5bkHQTPjgRuaTj4IrLe87oSmyqkLkwlIzyt95l77SdNoVPMhAJanxOAA-mZPzignVDMNE4b8bMZHX9wYx5eUtCK19GK605Z9frfWJ1Hdcu7I0eDL5M9-q57qnSsf7kLQGzlisNBKlbyQQgRCqGIWUzIY_JAoyZXEiUs355vcVloTrC6WxvzOZeWvODPUwU6HHn8H-EdbP4AilPfkkB12NG6j0Qet7MwHZp6xNCsMc5qT7NpPzbScfAE_vErW9VENRyzPsEf3F4oXA_5P1FIyG-fkttY-GvmRG4Wn0kZHy3vXI2jZ6KG4E-G0wAsqnR2U4s%3D)
---

The United States is far from a perfect country, but we’re a country constantly in a state of improvement. _**Imagine if an athlete from China pulled such a stunt? They would be arrested**_.

I’ll leave you with one last thought today. I worked alongside the FBIs Hostage Recovery team to recover a US citizen being held captive in the African country of Uganda, and I can only imagine the pure sense of joy and relief the individual experienced when they caught a glimpse of the American flag on our right arms and heard the words “ _**We’re from the United States, and we’re here to take you home**_.”

I hope Ms. Berry realizes how ironic it is that only in the United States could an Olympic athlete turn their back on the American flag, then be welcomed home without punishment.

We owe everything we have to the United States, however imperfect of a country we are. We’re so fortunate to call ourselves Americans.

**[I hope you’ll help me send Gwen Berry as many American flags as money can buy, we can’t let her forget who she is going to representing at the Olympics in Tokyo this month](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fe7200cbabaf423eae7a0a4e68248348&_e=AFzoXJdBRTJRvgkOvgVQrERuIUuvJCtplX-88o8wlwZcCDrz8qZLkq5YgsVs0RA99XREeayb-HRGXirCWdM-jmL9Rz6JR_tXmd9NNdRrg5bkHQTPjgRuaTj4IrLe87oSmyqkLkwlIzyt95l77SdNoVPMhAJanxOAA-mZPzignVDMNE4b8bMZHX9wYx5eUtCKbI-29vouZlS68gqRuPbOMVAjJoDDCrVQMk7VJoCtCGpiKEMpkP-CUpGr0qFiRPRYURSSwRxlZJ-IDMxCSxVG9BrEzuhK1iMPHitI2Pp2Tz-NVqg-z01inNoSbu-N0rRAg3qaOzTpipVuaa--QUpn4eJOWLoY063YqDUKc6MymocZFwJVTGtfWgMrU3-jCwAnCJK-Gboo_WxHULaTlQwYgAQYHo8BYP52-cbFrNTOaEI%3D)**.
[**STAND WITH ME AND OLD GLORY
SEND A FLAG TO GWEN BERRY ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fe7200cbabaf423eae7a0a4e68248348&_e=AFzoXJdBRTJRvgkOvgVQrERuIUuvJCtplX-88o8wlwZcCDrz8qZLkq5YgsVs0RA99XREeayb-HRGXirCWdM-jmL9Rz6JR_tXmd9NNdRrg5bkHQTPjgRuaTj4IrLe87oSmyqkLkwlIzyt95l77SdNoVPMhAJanxOAA-mZPzignVDMNE4b8bMZHX9wYx5eUtCKcsd__iwZFNv_iT9meCVwx5ylSAja8pEc6Gezh5gDaPlJR5otyyTPKUFLLEc7sQLW8CjkSkphxLONhCgIoAWLLmYYCeYX-inhG8L-AHIKRlYmATqJ3r4eR2Yxyy3Hqx4ul_4-e28wOaGB86_HYTwbxpmvPwGUOdgPuNbwy8LSkC9D0Fgy7UaPysq9WjfSuseLkKaj4_eDJxdT8anMTaBjrbuV8uf6aLR_GI4ABEwsyrc%3D)
---

For Old Glory
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

| Paid for by John Castorani for Congress
P.O. BOX 390
ORANGE, VA 22960

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: 2 trips to the border, my week on military duty and more
body:
Remembering Donald Rumsfeld, poll of the week and more. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/522928006683/2-trips-to-the-border-my-week-on-military-duty-and-more?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## Vice President Kamala Harris and former President Trump visit the border...
In the past week there have been two very different visits to the border. Vice President Kamala Harris visited with the border to draw attention away from the crisis. Then yesterday, Governor Abbott and former President Trump went to show people just how bad the situation is. Watch what Representative Chip Roy describe what he has witnessed from the border and what he saw on former President Trump’s visit to the border:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cdeb2753eb&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | |
# Last week on Military duty...
I was out on military leave last week, while Lyndsay and the team were holding it down, check out this reel of one of the training exercises I was a part of: |
---
[Click here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a009b394d5&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=93dfc7b413&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[‘Not a healthy environment’: Kamala Harris’ office rife with dissent](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=54debf3b8e&e=f6564bbe3b) \- Christopher Cadelgo, Daniel Lippmann and Eugene Daniels in _Politico_ [China is building more than 100 new missile silos in its western desert, analysts say](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6f2a94f1a0&e=f6564bbe3b) \- Joby Warrick in _The Washington Post_[Olympic hammer thrower Gwen Berry 'pissed' national anthem was playing at Olympic trials](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d01d6a87c0&e=f6564bbe3b) \- Sam Raskin for _The NY Post_[People Are Flocking To The Republican Party](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=78dd68acc6&e=f6564bbe3b) \- Paris Dennard in _The Carolinian Newspaper_
| | | |
---
## Remembering Donald Rumsfeld...
You can read the rest of Donald Rumsfeld’s well known, “Rumsfeld Rules” here:
| [Read the Rumsfeld Rules](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=eccd8976e0&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
Last week I asked who would provide more transparency to the media on their trip to the border, former President Donald Trump or Vice President Kamala Harris, the answer was overwhelmingly Trump. Now that they’ve both visited, I want to know...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=46bf4373ae&e=f6564bbe3b)
Answer [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f914019c99&e=f6564bbe3b).
| | | |
---
| | | | | |
## What I’m reading this week...
Michael Knowles is a regular guest on Spicer & Co and he has mentioned this upcoming project before, but now it is released and available. This is a very important read in today’s climate and I recommend adding it to your list. Let me know what you think. |
---
[Get it here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6ae6c83c8f&e=f6564bbe3b)

name: BREAKING Border News (via House Conservatives Fund)
subject: This is URGENT ⬇️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND
body:
Fellow Conservative, **_This one’s on us — we are at the border and saw that we missed our deadline!_** As you’ve seen in our previous emails, our End of Quarter deadline just passed, but our team was so caught up in President Trump and Congressman Jim Banks' visit to the southern border to observe the illegal immigration crisis. name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said, Peter…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850047:JChNkWltN:m:1:3253819041:5AF64A1E33BBCC7F3631A271935321A2:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850047:JChNkWltN:m:1:3253819041:5AF64A1E33BBCC7F3631A271935321A2:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. [**But there 's something you can do.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850047:JChNkWltN:m:1:3253819041:5AF64A1E33BBCC7F3631A271935321A2:r) That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. name: Ted Cruz
subject: This is what a Republican looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850689:6SbukWlNI:m:1:3253819041:4E7D891C99A1FCCEFE2F444E4224AA29:r)
---
Peter,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left's game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we're seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what's on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850689:6SbukWlNI:m:1:3253819041:4E7D891C99A1FCCEFE2F444E4224AA29:r)
[ THIS IS WHAT REPUBLICANS LOOK LIKE
HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850689:6SbukWlNI:m:1:3253819041:4E7D891C99A1FCCEFE2F444E4224AA29:r)

Will you please **[chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850689:6SbukWlNI:m:1:3253819041:4E7D891C99A1FCCEFE2F444E4224AA29:r)** to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for?

I encouraged Monica to try again - a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. **[Monica has my endorsement, but she won 't be able to pull off a win for Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850689:6SbukWlNI:m:1:3253819041:4E7D891C99A1FCCEFE2F444E4224AA29:r)**.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before June 30th, and I've pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. **[Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a Latina Republican to Congress?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850689:6SbukWlNI:m:1:3253819041:4E7D891C99A1FCCEFE2F444E4224AA29:r)**

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850689:6SbukWlNI:m:1:3253819041:4E7D891C99A1FCCEFE2F444E4224AA29:r)
We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica 's race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

On behalf of my friend Monica, **[I'm asking you to give generously](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850689:6SbukWlNI:m:1:3253819041:4E7D891C99A1FCCEFE2F444E4224AA29:r)** - whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she'll make us all proud.

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850689:6SbukWlNI:m:1:3253819041:4E7D891C99A1FCCEFE2F444E4224AA29:r)

Respectfully,
Senator Ted Cruz

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57850689:6SbukWlNI:m:1:3253819041:4E7D891C99A1FCCEFE2F444E4224AA29:r)

| Paid for by Monica for Congress

Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas. Will you please to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for? I encouraged Monica to try again - a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. . Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before June 30th, and I've pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas. We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community. Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica 's race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED! On behalf of my friend Monica, - whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she'll make us all proud. Respectfully, Senator Ted Cruz | Paid for by Monica for Congress This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-41979889902-echo7-485152AADF5760E984A81718E62F9660@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

Friends, Did you hear the BIG news? Arizona just WON a landmark case that will have nationwide ramifications in our fight for election integrity. **In a 6-3 decision, the U.S. Supreme Court upheld Arizona’s efforts to safeguard its elections in**** _Brnovich v. Democratic National Committee_****. ** More specifically, the Court upheld two provisions of Arizona voting law – one restricting the practice of ballot harvesting and another requiring ballots cast at the wrong precinct to be discarded. **Despite what Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are saying, this case does not undermine democracy. On the contrary, this case PROTECTS our democracy, stops fraud, and ensures Arizonans and Americans are able to have faith in our elections. ** If you’re unfamiliar with ballot harvesting, it’s the process whereby third parties personally gather and submit completed absentee/mail-in ballots rather than allowing voters to submit the ballot themselves.

**But let’s call it what it actually is – it is Democrats and liberal activists preying upon the elderly and those who do not speak English well in order to sway the outcome of close elections. It’s a process rife with FRAUD and it is WRONG.** _This case is important for another reason as well. It demonstrates just how important the office of Attorney General truly is and why I am running for this vital position.
